instructions_en: Begin in a power rack with the pins and bar set at the appropriate height. After loading the bar, attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings.

Keep your head facing forward. With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.
name_es: Con banda de asistencia inversa sentadilla power
instructions_es: Empieza in a rack de potencia with the pins and barra set at the appropriate height. After loading the barra, attach bandas to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Sujeta the other end of the bandas to the barra.

Empieza by stepping under the barra and placing it across the espalda of the hombros. Squeeze your hombro blades together and rotate your codos forward, attempting to bend the barra across your hombros. Remove the barra from the rack, creating a tight arch in your zona lumbar, and step espalda into posición. Coloca your pies wide for more emphasis on the espalda, glúteos, adductors, and isquios.

Mantén your cabeza facing forward. With your espalda, hombros, and core tight, push your rodillas and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit espalda with your caderas as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower barra posición necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the barra over the talones. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the cadera being in line with the top of the rodilla.

Manténing the peso on your talones and pushing your pies and rodillas out, drive upward as you lead the movimiento with your cabeza. Continue upward, maintaining tightness cabeza to toe, until you have returned to the posición inicial.

instructions_en: Set the bar up in a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either bands pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With your feet, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and bend the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.
name_es: Con banda de asistencia inversa peso muerto
instructions_es: Coloca the barra up in a rack de potencia. Sujeta bandas to the top of the rack, using either bandas pegs or the frame itself. Sujeta the other end of the bandas to the barra.

Approach the barra so that it is centered over your pies. You pies should be about cadera width apart. Bend at the cadera to grip the barra at hombro width, allowing your hombro blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overmano grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With your pies, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your caderas and bend the rodillas until your shins contact the barra. Look forward with your cabeza, keep your pecho up and your espalda arched, and begin driving through the talones to move the peso upward.
After the barra passes the rodillas, aggressively pull the barra espalda, pulling your hombro blades together as you drive your caderas forward into the barra.
Lower the barra by bending at the caderas and guiding it to the suelo.

instructions_en: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you.  Set up the bands either on band pegs or attached to the top of the rack, ensuring they will be directly above the bar during the squat. Attach the other end to the bar.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barbell to the rack.
name_es: Con banda de asistencia inversa sentadilla a cajón
instructions_es: Empieza in a rack de potencia with a cajón at the appropriate height behind you.  Coloca up the bandas either on banda pegs or attached to the top of the rack, ensuring they will be directly above the barra during the squat. Sujeta the other end to the barra.

Empieza by stepping under the barra and placing it across the espalda of the hombros. Squeeze your hombro blades together and rotate your codos forward, attempting to bend the barra across your hombros. Remove the barra from the rack, creating a tight arch in your zona lumbar, and step espalda into posición. Coloca your pies wider for more emphasis on the espalda, glúteos, adductors, and isquios, or closer together for more quad development. Mantén your cabeza facing forward.

With your espalda, hombros, and core tight, push your rodillas and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit espalda with your caderas until you are seated on the cajón. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the cajón, and relax the cadera flexors. Never bounce off of a cajón.

Manténing the peso on your talones and pushing your pies and rodillas out, drive upward off of the cajón as you lead the movimiento with your cabeza. Continue upward, maintaining tightness cabeza to toe. Use care to return the barrara to the rack.

instructions_en: Position a bench inside a power rack, with the bar set to the correct height. Begin by anchoring bands either to band pegs or to the top of the rack. Ensure that you will be position properly under the bands. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Lie on the bench,  tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.
name_es: Con banda de asistencia inversa press de banca
instructions_es: Position a banco inside a rack de potencia, with the barra set to the correct height. Empieza by anchoring bandas either to banda pegs or to the top of the rack. Ensure that you will be posición properly under the bandas. Sujeta the other end to the barrara.

Túmbate on the banco,  tuck your pies underneath you and arch your espalda. Using the barra to help support your peso, lift your hombro off the banco and retract them, squeezing the hombro blades together. Use your pies to drive your traps into the banco. Mantén this tight body posición throughout the movimiento. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the barra.

Pull the barra out of the rack without protracting your hombros. Focus on squeezing the barra and trying to pull it apart. Lower the barra to your lower pecho or upper stomach. The barra, wrist, and codo should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barrara touches your torso, and then drive the barra up with as much force as possible. The codos should be tucked in until lockout.

instructions_en: Grab a dynaband and step onto the middle of the it with a shoulder width stance (the width of your stance will increase/decrease the resistance). Cross the handles over and take hold of one in each hand. At this point the band should form an 'X' shape in front of you. Once you have done this, lean forward from your waist until your torso is parallel with the floor and have a slight bend at your knees. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the handles out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift them until your arms are parallel to the floor, squeeze your shoulder blades together to acheive this.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Rear Delt Cable Flyes or Face Pulls.
instructions_es: Coge a dynabanda and step onto the middle of the it with a hombro width stance (the width of your stance will increase/decrease the resistencia). Cross the asas over and take hold of one in each mano. At this point the banda should form an 'X' shape in front of you. Once you have done this, lean forward from your waist until your torso is parallel with the suelo and have a slight bend at your rodillas. Let your brazos hang infront of you, perpendicular to the suelo. Esta será la posición inicial.

Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the asas out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift them until your brazos are parallel to the suelo, squeeze your hombro blades together to acheive this.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asas along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Rear Delt Polea Flyes or Face Pulls.

instructions_en: Grab a dynaband and take a handle in each hand (neutral grip, palms facing each other). Step onto the middle of the band and adopt a shoulder width stance (the width of your stance will increase/decrease the resistance). Once you have done this, make sure you are in an upright position with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the handles out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift them until your arms are parallel to the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Lateral Raises or Seated Lateral Raises.
instructions_es: Coge a dynabanda and take a asa in each mano (agarre neutro, palms facing each other). Step onto the middle of the banda and adopt a hombro width stance (the width of your stance will increase/decrease the resistencia). Once you have done this, make sure you are in an upright posición with a slight bend at your rodillas and codos. Let your brazos hang infront of you, perpendicular to the suelo. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the asas out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift them until your brazos are parallel to the suelo.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asas along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: Lateral Raises or Seated Lateral Raises.

instructions_en: Secure a band to a rigid structure around belly button height. Stand side on to the structure and take a step away. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position and take hold of the band with the hand nearest the structure. Once you have hold of the band, tuck your elbow in close to your torso (your elbow should be at a 90 degree angle). This will be your starting position.

Exhale and rotate your hand on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your elbow which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your shoulder fully so that your forearm is as close to a right angle across your body as possible.
After a brief pause, return the band along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Caution: Be cautious with the weight as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variations: Dumbbell Internal Rotations or Cable Internal Rotations.
instructions_es: Fija a banda to a rigid structure around belly button height. Colócate de pie side on to the structure and take a step away. Adopt a hombro width, upright standing posición and take hold of the banda with the mano nearest the structure. Once you have hold of the banda, tuck your codo in close to your torso (your codo should be at a 90 degree angle). Esta será la posición inicial.

Espira and rotate your mano on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your codo which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your hombro fully so that your forebrazo is as close to a right angle across your body as possible.
Tras una breve pausa, return the banda along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap brazos.
Precaución: Be cautious with the peso as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variaciones: mancuerna Internal Rotations or Polea Internal Rotations.

instructions_en: Securely attach a band around a rigid structure at around ankle height, with the other end of the band around your ankle. Whilst facing away from the structure, take one step forwards (you can hold on to a support for balance if you need to). Remember to maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

To inititate the movement, exhale and pull your knee up towards your chest. This promotes a semicircular movement with your ankle, infront of your body. Continue to lift your knee upward until you cannot lift it any higher.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the ankle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap legs.
instructions_es: Fijaly attach a banda around a rigid structure at around ankle height, with the other end of the banda around your ankle. Whilst facing away from the structure, take one step forwards (you can hold on to a support for balance if you need to). Remember to maintain a straight espalda throughout. Esta será la posición inicial.

To inititate the movimiento, espira and pull your rodilla up hacia your pecho. This promotes a semicircular movimiento with your ankle, infront of your body. Continue to lift your rodilla upward until you cannot lift it any higher.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the ankle along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap legs.

instructions_en: Securely attach a band around a rigid structure at around ankle height, with the other end of the band around your ankle. Whilst facing the structure, take one step backwards and hold on for support. Tip: You should lean forwards from your hips and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.
Whilst keeping a gentle bend at your knee and hip, exhale and squeeze the glute of the leg you have the band attached to. This promotes a semicircular movement with your ankle, behind your body.
Once you have achieved a peak contraction through your glute, pause for a brief moment, inhale and return the ankle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap legs.
Variation: Cable Hip Extensions
instructions_es: Fijaly attach a banda around a rigid structure at around ankle height, with the other end of the banda around your ankle. Whilst facing the structure, take one step espaldawards and hold on for support. Consejo: You should lean forwards from your caderas and maintain a straight espalda throughout. Esta será la posición inicial.

Whilst keeping a gentle bend at your rodilla and cadera, espira and squeeze the glute of the leg you have the banda attached to. This promotes a semicircular movimiento with your ankle, behind your body.
Once you have achieved a peak contraction through your glute, pause for a brief moment, inspira and return the ankle along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap legs.
Variación: Polea Hip Extensions

instructions_en: Securely attach a dynaband around two rigid structures very close to, if not on the floor. Once you have done this, lay down (face up) so that your hips are under the band. Have your torso flat on the floor with your arms by your sides. Your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heels to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.

After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heels). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Glute Bridge or Barbell Hip Thrust.
instructions_es: Fijaly attach a dynabanda around two rigid structures very close to, if not on the suelo. Once you have done this, lay down (boca arriba) so that your caderas are under the banda. Have your torso flat on the suelo with your brazos by your sides. Your pies should be planted on the suelo with your rodillas bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and drive through your talones to lift your caderas toward the techo by squeezing your glúteos. As you do so, lean espalda onto your hombros and keep driving upward until your glúteos are fully contracted.

Tras una breve pausa, inspira and gently relax your glúteos to drop your pelvis hacia the suelo (the resistencia should be placed through your talones). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glúteos touch the suelo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: barra Glute Bridge or barra Hip Thrust.

instructions_en: Secure a band to a rigid structure around belly button height. Stand side on to the structure and take a step away. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position and take hold of the band with the hand furthest from the machine. Once you have hold of the band, tuck your elbow in close to your torso (your elbow should be at a 90 degree angle). This will be your starting position.

Exhale and rotate your hand on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your elbow which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your shoulder fully so that your hand is as close to a right angle (pointing away from your body) as possible.
After a brief pause, return the band along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Caution: Be cautious with the weight as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variations: Dumbbell External Rotations or Cable External Rotations.
instructions_es: Fija a banda to a rigid structure around belly button height. Colócate de pie side on to the structure and take a step away. Adopt a hombro width, upright standing posición and take hold of the banda with the mano furthest from the máquina. Once you have hold of the banda, tuck your codo in close to your torso (your codo should be at a 90 degree angle). Esta será la posición inicial.

Espira and rotate your mano on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your codo which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your hombro fully so that your mano is as close to a right angle (pointing away from your body) as possible.
Tras una breve pausa, return the banda along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap brazos.
Precaución: Be cautious with the peso as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variaciones: mancuerna External Rotations or Polea External Rotations.

instructions_en: Grab a band (with the correct resistance) and place it flat on the floor. Stand on the band with a shoulder width stance, taking hold the ends with an overhand grip (palms facing behind you).

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back), bend at your knees and hips (until your hips are just above knee height) which will lower your torso. This will be the starting position of the exercise.

Initiate the movement by pressing through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously using the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. Maintain strict form (straight back) and exhale. Once you are in a standing position you should push your chest out by pulling your shoulder blades together.
After a brief pause, descend the band back along the same path and inhale until you are back in the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any back pain, this may not be suitable movement for you.
Variations: Hex Bar Deadlifts or Barbell Deadlifts.
instructions_es: Coge a banda (with the correct resistencia) and place it flat on the suelo. Colócate de pie on the banda with a hombro width stance, taking hold the ends with an overmano grip (palms facing behind you).

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight espalda), bend at your rodillas and caderas (until your caderas are just above rodilla height) which will lower your torso. This will be the posición inicial of the exercise.

Initiate the movimiento by pressing through your talones and cuádriceps mientras simultaneously using the muscles in your espalda to bring your torso into a vertical posición. Mantén strict form (straight espalda) and espira. Once you are in a standing posición you should push your pecho out by pulling your hombro blades together.
Tras una breve pausa, descend the banda espalda along the same path and inspira until you are espalda in the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any espalda pain, this may not be suitable movimiento for you.
Variaciones: Hex Bar Deadlifts or barra Deadlifts.

instructions_en: Grab a band (with the correct resistance) and place it flat on the floor. Stand on the band with a shoulder width stance, taking hold of the ends with an overhand grip (palms facing behind you). Stand up straight and pull as hard as you wish on the band. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and raise your heels as high as possible by pushing off of the balls of your feet, flexing your calves throughout the contraction. Your knees should remain extended. Hold the contracted position for a second before you start to go back down.
Inhale and return slowly to the starting position as you lower your heels towards the floor.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Calf Raises or Smith Machine Calf Raises.
instructions_es: Coge a banda (with the correct resistencia) and place it flat on the suelo. Colócate de pie on the banda with a hombro width stance, taking hold of the ends with an overmano grip (palms facing behind you). Colócate de pie up straight and pull as hard as you wish on the banda. Esta será la posición inicial.

Espira and raise your talones as high as possible by pushing off of the balls of your pies, flexing your gemelos throughout the contraction. Your rodillas should remain extended. Hold the contracted posición for a second before you start to go espalda down.
Inspira and return slowly to the posición inicial as you lower your talones hacia the suelo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Seated Calf Raises or multipower Calf Raises.

instructions_en: Place a box/bench just behind where you will be performing this movement. Now, attach either end of a band to a barbell. Place the barbell across the back of your shoulders and have a partner pull the middle of the band down so that you can stand on it.

Adopt a shoulder width stance on the band with your toes slightly pointing outward just in front of the box/bench. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your glutes gently touch the box.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a partner. If you do not have a partner, be cautious. If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Barbell Box Squats.
instructions_es: Coloca a cajón/banco just behind where you will be performing this movimiento. Now, attach either end of a banda to a barrara. Coloca the barrara across the espalda of your hombros and have a partner pull the middle of the banda down so that you can stand on it.

Adopt a hombro width stance on the banda with your toes slightly pointing outward just in front of the cajón/banco. Mantén a straight espalda throughout the movimiento and keep your cabeza up. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and begin to descend by bending at your rodillas and caderas. Your peso should be put predominantly through your talones as you sit espalda into the movimiento until your glúteos gently touch the cajón.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barra to the posición inicial along the same path, push through your talones with the force being driven through your cuádriceps and glúteos to do so. Colócate de pie to attention with your legs fully extended, espalda straight and hombros relaxed.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: This is a very complex movimiento and will require a partner. If you do not have a partner, be cautious. If you suffer from espalda issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variaciones: mancuerna Squats or barra Box Squats.

instructions_en: Place a band around both ankles and another around both knees. There should be enough tension that they are tight when your feet are shoulder width apart.
To begin, take short steps forward alternating your left and right foot.
After several steps, do just the opposite and walk backward to where you started.
instructions_es: Coloca a banda around both ankles and another around both rodillas. There should be enough tension that they are tight when your pies are hombro width apart.
To begin, take short steps forward alternating your left and right pie.
After several steps, do just the opposite and walk espaldaward to where you started.

instructions_en: Grab a band (with the correct resistance) and secure it around the end of a bench. Lay face up on that bench with your head located the same end as the band. Reach behind you to take hold of the handles and extend them upwards towards the ceiling. Continue until your arms are at full extension and your palms are facing away from you. Ensure that your elbows are tucked in and remain as close together throughout the movement as possible. This is your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the handles towards the back of your head. Be sure to keep your elbows tucked in and stretch your triceps as you go. When you get to within an inch of your forehead, pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the band along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cable Skull Crushers or EZ-Bar Skullcrushers.
instructions_es: Coge a banda (with the correct resistencia) and secure it around the end of a banco. Túmbate boca arriba on that banco with your cabeza located the same end as the banda. Reach behind you to take hold of the asas and extend them upwards hacia the techo. Continue until your brazos are at full extension and your palms are facing away from you. Ensure that your codos are tucked in and remain as close together throughout the movimiento as possible. Esta es la posición inicial.

Inspira as you descend the asas hacia the espalda of your cabeza. Be sure to keep your codos tucked in and stretch your tríceps as you go. When you get to within an inch of your forecabeza, pause for a second.
Then mientras exhaling, use your tríceps to return the banda along the same path to the posición inicial. Your brazos should be fully extended once again and pointing hacia the techo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: Polea Skull Crushers or EZ-Bar Skullcrushers.

instructions_en: Grab a band and take hold of it with both hands (adjust the width of your hands for more or less resistance). Keeping your arms straight (slight bend at your elbows), lift the band up to shoulder height in front of you.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your arms back out wide beside you, stretching the band as you go. Your body should now be in a 'T' shape with the band gently touching your chest. Tip: Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement and try not to rock or sway in order to stretch the band.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the band back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions_es: Coge a banda and take hold of it with both manos (adjust the width of your manos for more or less resistencia). Manténing your brazos straight (slight bend at your codos), lift the banda up to hombro height in front of you.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull your brazos espalda out wide beside you, stretching the banda as you go. Your body should now be in a 'T' shape with the banda gently touching your pecho. Consejo: Mantén your codos slightly bent throughout the movimiento and try not to rock or sway in order to stretch the banda.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the banda espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

instructions_en: Grab a dynaband and securely attach it to a rigid structure around ankle height. Stand side on to the structure you have attached the band to and place the other end around the ankle closest to the structure.
Stand upright (you can take hold of a rigid frame for balance if needed) and lift the leg off the floor the band is attached to. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring the working leg across your body and towards the outside of your standing leg. Keep your leg straight (knees slightly bent) and maintain a straight back throughout.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the ankle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Adduction Machine.
instructions_es: Coge a dynabanda and securely attach it to a rigid structure around ankle height. Colócate de pie side on to the structure you have attached the banda to and place the other end around the ankle closest to the structure.
Colócate de pie upright (you can take hold of a rigid frame for balance if needed) and lift the leg off the suelo the banda is attached to. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and bring the working leg across your body and hacia the outside of your standing leg. Mantén your leg straight (rodillas slightly bent) and maintain a straight espalda throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the ankle along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variación: Adduction Machine.

instructions_en: Using a 41 inch band, stand on one end, spreading your feet a small amount. Bend at the hips to loop the end of the band behind your neck. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your legs straight, extend through the hips to come to a near vertical position.
Ensure that you do not round your back as you go down back to the starting position.
instructions_es: Using a 41 inch banda, stand on one end, spreading your pies a small amount. Bend at the caderas to loop the end of the banda behind your neck. Esta será la posición inicial.
Manténing your legs straight, extend through the caderas to come to a near vertical posición.
Ensure that you do not round your espalda as you go down espalda to the posición inicial.

instructions_en: Attach a dynaband around a rigid structure (around shoulder height). Take a handle in each hand and face away from where you have tied the band. Press the handles in front of you until your arms are (nearly) straight. Adopt a shoulder width standing stance (you can split your stance if you wish to gain extra stability), whilst maintaining a straight back troughout the movement. Your palms should be facing each other. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, bring your arms back on a wide arc until your arms are out wide to your sides. Have a slight bend at your elbows and allow the resistance to stretch your pectoral muscles.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Flye Machine.
instructions_es: Sujeta a dynabanda around a rigid structure (around hombro height). Take a asa in each mano and face away from where you have tied the banda. Press the asas in front of you until your brazos are (nearly) straight. Adopt a hombro width standing stance (you can split your stance if you wish to gain extra stability), mientras maintaining a straight espalda troughout the movimiento. Your palms should be facing each other. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst inhaling, bring your brazos espalda on a wide arc until your brazos are out wide to your sides. Have a slight bend at your codos and allow the resistencia to stretch your pectoral muscles.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the asas espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Flyes or Flye Machine.

instructions_en: Tie a band around the middle of the Pull-Up bar and secure tightly! Once you have done this place one foot within the band and adopt an overhand, wide grip. Keep your arms extended and your back straight, in fact, from your head to your feet should be one straight line. This will be your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your body upward by contracting your lats (back muscles) and bending your elbows. The best way to do this is to pull your elbows towards the floor. Continue to pull yourself upwards until your head becomes in line with your hands. Tip: Avoid swinging, twisting or jerking motions as you could cause yourself an injury.After a brief pause, inhale and return your body along the same path back into the starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Horizontal Barbell Pull Up or Chin Ups.
instructions_es: Tie a banda around the middle of the dominadas barra and secure tightly! Once you have done this place one pie within the banda and adopt an overmano, agarre amplio. Mantén your brazos extended and your espalda straight, in fact, from your cabeza to your pies should be one straight line. Esta será la posición inicial.To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull your body upward by contracting your dorsales (espalda muscles) and bending your codos. The best way to do this is to pull your codos hacia the suelo. Continue to pull yourself upwards until your cabeza becomes in line with your manos. Consejo: Avoid swinging, twisting or jerking motions as you could cause yourself an injury.Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your body along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.Variaciones: Horizontal barra Pull Up or chin ups.

instructions_en: Place a dynaband around a rigid structure (around shoulder height) and place a step infront of it. The height of the step should be realistic to the ability of the user. Take hold of the dynaband so that it is at shoulder height and stretched enough to assist when your perform the movement. Your elbows should be flared out to the side and bent at a 90 degree angle. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement so that you minimise the risk of an injury. Now place your left foot on top of the step, your knee should roughly be at a 90 degree angle. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, step up onto the step by pushing through your left heel and thigh. As you do so, your hip and knee joints should straighten out. Lift your right leg onto the step at this point.
Inhale and return back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Step Ups or Barbell Step Ups.
instructions_es: Coloca a dynabanda around a rigid structure (around hombro height) and place a step infront of it. The height of the step should be realistic to the ability of the user. Take hold of the dynabanda so that it is at hombro height and stretched enough to assist when your perform the movimiento. Your codos should be flared out to the side and bent at a 90 degree angle. Mantén a straight espalda throughout the movimiento so that you minimise the risk of an injury. Now place your left pie on top of the step, your rodilla should roughly be at a 90 degree angle. Esta será la posición inicial.
As you espira, step up onto the step by pushing through your left talón and thigh. As you do so, your cadera and rodilla joints should straighten out. Lift your right leg onto the step at this point.
Inspira and return espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Step Ups or barra Step Ups.

instructions_en: Run a band around a stationary post like that of a squat rack.
Grab the band by the handles and stand back so that the tension in the band rises.

Extend and lift the arms straight in front of you. Tip: Your arms should be straight and parallel to the floor while perpendicular to your torso.  Your feet should be firmly planted on the floor spread at shoulder width.  This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, move your arms to the sides and back.  Keep your arms extended and parallel to the floor. Continue the movement until the arms are extended to your sides.
After a pause, go back to the original position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations:  You can perform this exercise on a rear delt machine as well or using a pulley machine.
instructions_es: Run a banda around a stationary post like that of a squat rack.
Coge the banda by the asas and stand espalda so that the tension in the banda rises.

Extend and lift the brazos straight in front of you. Consejo: Your brazos should be straight and parallel to the suelo while perpendicular to your torso.  Your pies should be firmly planted on the suelo spread at hombro width.  Esta será la posición inicial.
As you espira, move your brazos to the sides and espalda.  Mantén your brazos extended and parallel to the suelo. Continue the movimiento until the brazos are extended to your sides.
After a pause, go espalda to the original posición as you inspira.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones:  You can perform this exercise on a rear delt máquina as well or using a pulley máquina.

instructions_en: Grab a Swiss Ball and lay over the top of it (face down) with your hips supported. Have your feet shoulder width and placed against a wall or fixed in place by a support. Relax your torso over the ball with your hands placed gently on your temples. This is the starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and slowly pull your shoulders back and engage the muscles in your back (specifically, your lower back) until you cannot contract any more.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your torso along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be VERY careful if you suffer from lower back pain. This may not be the best suited exercise if so.
Variation: Skydivers.
instructions_es: Coge a Swiss Ball and lay over the top of it (boca abajo) with your caderas supported. Have your pies hombro width and placed against a wall or fixed in place by a support. Relax your torso over the ball with your manos placed gently on your temples. This is the posición inicial.
To initiate the movimiento, espira and slowly pull your hombros espalda and engage the muscles in your espalda (specifically, your zona lumbar) until you cannot contract any more.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your torso along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: Be VERY careful if you suffer from zona lumbar pain. This may not be the best suited exercise if so.
Variación: Skydivers.

instructions_en: Grab an exercise ball and adopt a shoulder width standing stance. Hold the ball out in front of you at full arms reach, at shoulder height. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, twist your torso to your left as far as you possibly can (whilst keeping your arms out in front of you and at shoulder height).
Pause for a brief movement, inhale and use your core muscles to return the exercise ball back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Cable Russian Twists or V-Sit Twists (Medicine Ball).
instructions_es: Coge an exercise ball and adopt a hombro width standing stance. Hold the ball out in front of you at full brazos reach, at hombro height. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, twist your torso to your left as far as you possibly can (mientras keeping your brazos out in front of you and at hombro height).
Pause for a brief movimiento, inspira and use your core muscles to return the exercise ball espalda along the same path into its posición inicial.
Repite el movimiento el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: Polea Russian Twists or V-Sit Twists (Medicine Ball).

instructions_en: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is 2/3 of the way up its runner and set the weight accordingly. Next, attach a 'V' bar to the cable and place a swiss ball adjacent to the runner (around 2 feet away) and lay on top of it. To get into position, take a seat on top of it and walk your body down the ball until your shoulders and neck are supported by it, whilst your feet are shoulder width apart and supporting the rest of your bodyweight. Your knees should be at a 90 degree angle, hips pushed up towards the ceiling through your glutes and your back should be straight. The handle should now be in line with your chest, fully extend your arms and take hold of it. Pull the handle slightly so it is now above your chest, your arms aiming vertically towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and rotate through your core to turn your shoulders away from the cable machine. Keep your arms extended as you rotate and continue until your arms become parallel to the floor. The only point of contact with the swiss ball should be through your shoulder.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Russian Twists or Hip Crossovers.
instructions_es: Adjust a polea pulley so that it is 2/3 of the way up its runner and set the peso accordingly. Next, attach a 'V' barra to the polea and place a swiss ball adjacent to the runner (around 2 pies away) and lay on top of it. To get into posición, take a seat on top of it and walk your body down the ball until your hombros and neck are supported by it, mientras your pies are hombro width apart and supporting the rest of your bodypeso. Your rodillas should be at a 90 degree angle, caderas pushed up hacia the techo through your glúteos and your espalda should be straight. The asa should now be in line with your pecho, fully extend your brazos and take hold of it. Pull the asa slightly so it is now above your pecho, your brazos aiming vertically hacia the techo. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and rotate through your core to turn your hombros away from the polea máquina. Mantén your brazos extended as you rotate and continue until your brazos become parallel to the suelo. The only point of contact with the swiss ball should be through your hombro.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: Russian Twists or Hip Crossovers.

name_en: Press Ups Feet On An Exercise Ball
instructions_en: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor with an exercise ball close by, and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Next you will need to place your feet on top of the exercise ball so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and the exercise ball. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms vertical from the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whist flaring your elbows out wide. When you are about an inch or so from the ground, you should have created a triangle with your hand positions and your eye line.

Pause for a brief movement, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out. Remember to keep your body straight throughout.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Decline Push-ups or Machine Bench Press.
name_es: Press Ups Feet On An fitball
instructions_es: To start this exercise rodillal down on the suelo with an exercise ball close by, and lean forward so that you are now peso barraing on your brazos. Have your manos placed just outside of where your pecho would be. Next you will need to place your pies on top of the exercise ball so that your body is suspended above the suelo, the only points of contact (with the suelo) should be your manos and the exercise ball. Your body should be in one straight line from cabeza to toe and your brazos vertical from the suelo under your pecho. Esta será la posición inicial.

Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your pecho hacia the ground whist flaring your codos out wide. When you are about an inch or so from the ground, you should have created a triangle with your mano posicións and your eye line.

Pause for a brief movimiento, espira and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the posición inicial. Consejo: Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you do so and when you get to the top of the movimiento, do not lock your codos out. Remember to keep your body straight throughout.
Repite el movimiento el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Decline Push-ups or Machine Bench Press.

name_en: Oblique Crunches On An Exercise Ball
instructions_en: Sit upright on an exercise ball with a straight back and a 90 degree bend at your hips and knees. Once in this position, slowly and in a controlled manner roll onto your right hip. At this point your legs will straighten (slight bend at your knees) and they will become crossed for extra stability. Have your torso relaxed over the top of the ball and place your left hand gently onto your temple. Your right arm can either come across your body onto the left side of your rib cage or placed on the exercise ball for greater stability. This is the starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and contract the left side of your torso, bringing your left elbow as close to your hip as possible.
Once you cannot contract your torso anymore, pause for a brief moment, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Oblique Crunches or Cable Oblique Crunches.
instructions_es: Sit upright on an exercise ball with a straight espalda and a 90 degree bend at your caderas and rodillas. Once in this posición, slowly and in a controlled manner roll onto your right cadera. At this point your legs will straighten (slight bend at your rodillas) and they will become crossed for extra stability. Have your torso relaxed over the top of the ball and place your left mano gently onto your temple. Your right brazo can either come across your body onto the left side of your rib cage or placed on the exercise ball for greater stability. This is the posición inicial.
To initiate the movimiento, espira and contract the left side of your torso, bringing your left codo as close to your cadera as possible.
Once you cannot contract your torso anymore, pause for a brief moment, inspira and return your body espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: Oblique Crunches or Polea Oblique Crunches.

instructions_en: Seat yourself on the floor.
Straddle an exercise ball between both legs and lower your hips  down toward the floor.

Hug your arms around the ball to support your body. Adjust your legs so that your feet are flat on the floor and your knees line up over your ankles. Keep a good grip on the ball so it doesn't roll away from you and send you back onto your buttocks.
instructions_es: Seat yourself on the suelo.
Straddle an exercise ball between both legs and lower your caderas  down toward the suelo.

Hug your brazos around the ball to support your body. Adjust your legs so that your pies are flat on the suelo and your rodillas line up over your ankles. Mantén a good grip on the ball so it doesn't roll away from you and send you espalda onto your buttocks.

instructions_en: To get into position for this exercise you will need to place your hands shoulder width apart on the floor (as if you were in the starting position for a press up) and place your shins on top of a swiss ball. Keep your abdominals tight throughout this movement in order to keep alignment from your shoulders to your feet. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement you will be pulling the swiss ball in towards your torso by lifting your hips slightly to allow your knees to be driven in towards your chest. Your shins will be replaced on the swiss ball by your feet and toes. Tip: This entire movement is directed by your abdominal muscles with your lower back playing no part at all. If you find it is hurting, either lift your pelvis or use an alternative exercise.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your knees back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Cable Crunches.
instructions_es: To get into posición for this exercise you will need to place your manos hombro width apart on the suelo (as if you were in the posición inicial for a press up) and place your shins on top of a swiss ball. Mantén your abdominals tight throughout this movimiento in order to keep alignment from your hombros to your pies. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate this movimiento you will be pulling the swiss ball in hacia your torso by lifting your caderas slightly to allow your rodillas to be driven in hacia your pecho. Your shins will be replaced on the swiss ball by your pies and toes. Consejo: This entire movimiento is directed by your abdominal muscles with your zona lumbar playing no part at all. If you find it is hurting, either lift your pelvis or use an alternative exercise.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your rodillas espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: Cocoons or Polea Crunches.

instructions_en: Sit on a swiss ball with an upright posture and a 90 degree bend at your hips and knees. Slowly walk your feet forward allowing your body to move down the ball until your lower back is supported. Maintain the 90 degree bend at your knees and allow your torso to be laying flat on top of the ball. There should be a straight line between your knees and your head, your lower back being supported by the swiss ball. Have your feet about shoulder width apart and your hands gently placed on your temples. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and contract your abdominal muscles in order to lift your shoulders up and toward your knees. Your lower back should remain in contact with the swiss ball throughout the movement. Continue to curl your shoulders towards your knees until your abdominals cannot contract anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your shoulders along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Crunches or Cocoons.
instructions_es: Sit on a swiss ball with an upright posture and a 90 degree bend at your caderas and rodillas. Slowly walk your pies forward allowing your body to move down the ball until your zona lumbar is supported. Mantén the 90 degree bend at your rodillas and allow your torso to be laying flat on top of the ball. There should be a straight line between your rodillas and your cabeza, your zona lumbar being supported by the swiss ball. Have your pies about hombro width apart and your manos gently placed on your temples. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and contract your abdominal muscles in order to lift your hombros up and toward your rodillas. Your zona lumbar should remain in contact with the swiss ball throughout the movimiento. Continue to curl your hombros hacia your rodillas until your abdominals cannot contract anymore.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your hombros along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Polea Crunches or Cocoons.

instructions_en: Lay down on your back with your lower legs resting on top of a swiss ball, creating a 90 degree bend at your hips and knees. Have your hands on your temples with your elbows out wide. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and contract your abdominal muscles in order to lift your shoulders up and off the floor toward your knees. Your lower back should remain in contact with the floor throughout the movement. Continue to curl your shoulders towards your knees until your abdominals cannot contract anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your shoulders along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Cocoons.
instructions_es: Túmbate down on your espalda with your lower legs resting on top of a swiss ball, creating a 90 degree bend at your caderas and rodillas. Have your manos on your temples with your codos out wide. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and contract your abdominal muscles in order to lift your hombros up and off the suelo toward your rodillas. Your zona lumbar should remain in contact with the suelo throughout the movimiento. Continue to curl your hombros hacia your rodillas until your abdominals cannot contract anymore.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your hombros along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Crunches or Cocoons.

instructions_en: Lay on your back on a mat with your feet propped up on top of a swiss ball. Your arms should be laying flat alongside your torso. Have your heels so that they are in the centre of the swiss ball so that you can apply pressure directly down through the ball and into the floor. Squeeze your glutes to lift your pelvis and elevate your body off the floor, your body should now be in one straight line. Your arms and shoulders should be taking the weight as well as your hamstrings from your heel position. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your heels in towards your hips. Bend at your knees to do so but keep your pelvis pushed forward so that you still have a straight line from your shoulders to knees.
Pause for a brief moment, inhale and return your ankles along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Leg Curls or Seated Leg Curls.
instructions_es: Túmbate on your espalda on a mat with your pies propped up on top of a swiss ball. Your brazos should be laying flat alongside your torso. Have your talones so that they are in the centre of the swiss ball so that you can apply pressure directly down through the ball and into the suelo. Squeeze your glúteos to lift your pelvis and elevate your body off the suelo, your body should now be in one straight line. Your brazos and hombros should be taking the peso as well as your isquios from your talón posición. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull your talones in hacia your caderas. Bend at your rodillas to do so but keep your pelvis pushed forward so that you still have a straight line from your hombros to rodillas.
Pause for a brief moment, inspira and return your ankles along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Lying Leg Curls or Seated Leg Curls.

instructions_en: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a wide, overhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pull-Ups or Cable Pullovers.
instructions_es: Coloca the peso to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the máquina (tuck your caderas in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a wide, overmano grip with your brazos extended hacia the techo. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull the barra down hacia your pecho using the muscles across your espalda and your bíceps. Lean espalda ever so slightly as your pull the peso downwards and lift your pecho as much as you can. Continue to pull the barra down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your pecho.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra espalda along the same path into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: dominadass or Polea Pullovers.

instructions_en: To get yourself into the starting position, set the pulleys at the floor level (lowest level possible on the machine that is below your torso).
Place an incline bench (set at 45 degrees) in between the pulleys, select a weight on each one and grab a pulley on each hand.
With a handle on each hand, lie on the incline bench and bring your hands together at arms length in front of your face.  This will be your starting position.

With a slight bend of your elbows (in order to prevent stress at the biceps tendon), lower your arms out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your chest.  Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: Keep in mind that throughout the movement, the arms should remain stationary.  The movement should only occur at the shoulder joint.

Return your arms back to the starting position as you squeeze your chest muscles and exhale.  Hold the contracted position for a second.  Tip: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the weights.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variation: You can vary the angle of the bench in order to target the upper chest at slightly different angles.
instructions_es: To get yourself into the posición inicial, set the pulleys at the suelo level (lowest level possible on the máquina that is below your torso).
Coloca an incline banco (set at 45 degrees) in between the pulleys, select a peso on each one and grab a pulley on each mano.
With a asa on each mano, lie on the incline banco and bring your manos together at brazos length in front of your face.  Esta será la posición inicial.

With a slight bend of your codos (in order to prevent stress at the bíceps tendon), lower your brazos out at both sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch on your pecho.  Breathe in as you perform this portion of the movimiento.  Consejo: Mantén in mind that throughout the movimiento, the brazos should remain stationary.  The movimiento should only occur at the hombro joint.

Return your brazos espalda to the posición inicial as you squeeze your pecho muscles and espira.  Hold the contracted posición for a second.  Consejo: Make sure to use the same arc of motion used to lower the pesos.
Repeat the movimiento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variación: You can vary the angle of the banco in order to target the upper pecho at slightly different angles.

instructions_en: Adjust the weight to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the handles. Your upper arms should be about 45 degrees to the body, with your head and chest up. The elbows should be bent to about 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Begin by extending through the elbow, pressing the handles together straight in front of you. Keep your shoulder blades retracted as you execute the movement.
After pausing at full extension, return to the starting position, keeping tension on the cables.
instructions_es: Adjust the peso to an appropriate amount and be seated, grasping the asas. Your upper brazos should be about 45 degrees to the body, with your cabeza and pecho up. The codos should be bent to about 90 degrees. Esta será la posición inicial.
Empieza by extending through the codo, pressing the asas together straight in front of you. Mantén your hombro blades retracted as you execute the movimiento.
After pausing at full extension, return to the posición inicial, keeping tension on the poleas.

instructions_en: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and adopt a standing, shoulder width close to the pulley. Face the machine and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs). Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor creating a straight line from the cable to your shoulders. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and pull the bar upwards towards your chin. Flare your elbows out, high and wide and you do so, this will activate your shoulder muscles. Tip: Keep your elbows above your hands and maintain a straight back throughout this movement. Do not rock your bodyweight forward and backwards in order to generate momentum.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Upright Row Barbell or Smith Machine Upright Row.
instructions_es: Sujeta a straight barra to a low polea pulley and adopt a standing, hombro width close to the pulley. Face the máquina and take hold of the barra with an overmano grip (palms facing your thighs). Allow your brazos to hang perpendicular to the suelo creating a straight line from the polea to your hombros. Esta será la posición inicial.

Espira and pull the barra upwards hacia your chin. Flare your codos out, high and wide and you do so, this will activate your hombro muscles. Consejo: Mantén your codos above your manos and maintain a straight espalda throughout this movimiento. Do not rock your bodypeso forward and espaldawards in order to generate momentum.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Upright Row barra or multipower Upright Row.

name_en: Cable Tricep Push Down V Bar Attachment
instructions_en: Attach a V-bar to a high cable pulley. Adopt a shoulder width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palm facing the floor).

Once you have hold of the bar, take the weight by tucking your elbow into the side of your torso. Your forearms and upper arms should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your triceps to do this and contract fully when your arms are by your thighs. At this point, your arms should be perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in to your sides as only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Kickbacks or Overhead Tricep Extensions.
name_es: Polea tríceps empuje hacia abajo V Bar Attachment
instructions_es: Sujeta a V-barra to a high polea pulley. Adopt a hombro width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the máquina) and take hold of the barra with an overmano grip (palm facing the suelo).

Once you have hold of the barra, take the peso by tucking your codo into the side of your torso. Your forebrazos and upper brazos should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and push the barra down hacia your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your tríceps to do this and contract fully when your brazos are by your thighs. At this point, your brazos should be perpendicular to the suelo. Consejo: Mantén your codos tucked in to your sides as only the forebrazos should move.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Tricep Kickespaldas or Overcabeza Tricep Extensions.

name_en: Cable Tricep Push Down Bar Attachment
instructions_en: Attach a straight bar to a high cable pulley. Adopt a shoulder width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palm facing the floor).

Once you have hold of the bar, take the weight by tucking your elbow into the side of your torso. Your forearms and upper arms should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your triceps to do this and contract fully when your arms are by your thighs. At this point, your arms should be perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in to your sides as only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Kickbacks or Overhead Tricep Extensions.
name_es: Polea tríceps empuje hacia abajo Bar Attachment
instructions_es: Sujeta a straight barra to a high polea pulley. Adopt a hombro width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the máquina) and take hold of the barra with an overmano grip (palm facing the suelo).

Once you have hold of the barra, take the peso by tucking your codo into the side of your torso. Your forebrazos and upper brazos should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and push the barra down hacia your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your tríceps to do this and contract fully when your brazos are by your thighs. At this point, your brazos should be perpendicular to the suelo. Consejo: Mantén your codos tucked in to your sides as only the forebrazos should move.

Variaciones: Tricep Kickespaldas or Overcabeza Tricep Extensions.

instructions_en: Adopt a shoulder width stance underneath a high cable with a rope attached. Face away from the machine but be as close to it as possible, keep your legs straight throughout (slight bend at the knees). When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are next to your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward from your hips so that your torso is taking the weight.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Kneeling Cable Crunches or Cocoons.
instructions_es: Adopt a hombro width stance underneath a high polea with a rope attached. Face away from the máquina but be as close to it as possible, keep your legs straight throughout (slight bend at the rodillas). When setting the peso for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your zona lumbar will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are next to your cabeza on your upper pecho. Push your caderas espalda and lean forward from your caderas so that your torso is taking the peso.

From here you should try to arch your espalda by taking a deep breath, pulling your hombros espalda and pushing your pecho out. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Throughout this movimiento your caderas and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Espira and flex your abs to move your hombros (and rope) downward hacia your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your espalda reverses so that your espalda is now rounding over. Your codos should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return along the same path to your posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: If you suffer from zona lumbar pain, be cautious of the resistencia.
Variaciones: Kneeling Polea Crunches or Cocoons.

instructions_en: Attach a handle to a low cable pulley and take hold of it with an underhand grip (palm facing away from you). Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the handle up toward your shoulder by contracting your bicep. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the handle is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your bicep.
(Tip: Only the forearm should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return your arm along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Concentration Curls or Barbell Bicep Curls.
name_es: A una mano de pie polea curl
instructions_es: Sujeta a asa to a low polea pulley and take hold of it with an undermano grip (palm facing away from you). Colócate de pie upright around 12 inches away from the polea, maintaining a straight espalda throughout.

Whilst holding the upper brazo stationary, espira as you curl the asa up toward your hombro by contracting your bicep. Continue the movimiento until your bicep is fully contracted and the asa is at hombro level. Hold the contracted posición for a second as you squeeze your bicep.
(Consejo: Only the forebrazo should move.)
Inspira as you slowly begin to return your brazo along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap brazos.
Variaciones: Concentration Curls or barra Bicep Curls.

name_en: Single Arm Low Cable Overhead Tricep Extensions
instructions_en: Attach a handle to a low cable pulley, take hold of it and stand with an upright, shoulder width stance facing away from the machine, arm straight above your head vertical from the floor. Keep your elbow tucked in close to your ear and have your palm facing away from you. Allow your other arm to relax across your torso so it does not influence the movement. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement and keep your elbow pinned in close to your ear. This will be your starting position.
Whilst your upper arms remain stationary, inhale and lower the handle down on an arcing motion behind your head until your elbow is at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees).
Pause for a brief moment, exhale and return the handle along the same path to the starting position whilst contracting your triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Standing Overhead Barbell Triceps Extension.
name_es: A una mano Low polea por encima de la cabeza tríceps Extensions
instructions_es: Sujeta a asa to a low polea pulley, take hold of it and stand with an upright, hombro width stance facing away from the máquina, brazo straight above your cabeza vertical from the suelo. Mantén your codo tucked in close to your ear and have your palm facing away from you. Allow your other brazo to relax across your torso so it does not influence the movimiento. Consejo: Mantén a straight espalda throughout this movimiento and keep your codo pinned in close to your ear. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst your upper brazos remain stationary, inspira and lower the asa down on an arcing motion behind your cabeza until your codo is at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees).
Pause for a brief moment, espira and return the asa along the same path to the posición inicial mientras contracting your tríceps.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Colócate de pieing Overcabeza barra Triceps Extension.

name_en: Single Arm Cable Lat Raises Behind The Back
instructions_en: Place a handle attachment onto a low cable pulley. Stand side on to the machine with your right side being closest. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position, maintaining a straight back throughout. Reach across and behind your body and take hold of the handle with your left hand. Return to your original, standing position. This will be your starting position.

Initiate the movement by exhaling and elevating your left hand on a wide arc out to your side. Keep a slight bend at your elbow and continue to elevate upward until your arm is parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your arm along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Dumbbell Lateral Raises or Cable Lat Raises.
name_es: A una mano polea elevaciones laterales Behind The Back
instructions_es: Coloca a asa attachment onto a low polea pulley. Colócate de pie side on to the máquina with your right side being closest. Adopt a hombro width, upright standing posición, maintaining a straight espalda throughout. Reach across and behind your body and take hold of the asa with your left mano. Return to your original, standing posición. Esta será la posición inicial.

Initiate the movimiento by exhaling and elevating your left mano on a wide arc out to your side. Mantén a slight bend at your codo and continue to elevate upward until your brazo is parallel with the suelo.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your brazo along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variación: mancuerna Lateral Raises or Polea Lat Raises.

instructions_en: Attach a handle to a high pulley cable and adopt wide stance next to the machine around 12 inches away. Reach across your body and take hold of the handle in both hands. Both your arms should be straight (slight bend at the elbow) and this is how they must remain throughout. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and rotate your core so that your hands move down and across your body (in a straight diagonal line) aiming at the hip furthest from the machine. Keep your back and arms straight as you do so. Try to minimise the rotation of your hips so that your core is taking the load.
Once you have turned as far as your torso will allow, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning your arms back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
