Keep your elbows tucked in close to your ears and have your knuckles facing the ceiling. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement and keep your elbows pinned in close to your ears. This will be your starting position.
Whilst your upper arms remain stationary, inhale and lower the rope down on an arcing motion behind your head until your elbows are at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees).
Pause for a brief moment then exhale and return the rope along the same path to the starting position whilst contracting your triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Skullcrushers or Bench Dips.
name_es: Por encima de la cabeza tríceps Extensions Rope
instructions_es: Sujeta a rope to a low polea pulley, take hold of the rope and stand with an upright, hombro width stance facing away from the máquina, brazos straight above your cabeza with your little fingers on the rubber ends to the rope. Mantén your codos tucked in close to your ears and have your knuckles facing the techo. Consejo: Mantén a straight espalda throughout this movimiento and keep your codos pinned in close to your ears. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst your upper brazos remain stationary, inspira and lower the rope down on an arcing motion behind your cabeza until your codos are at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees).
Pause for a brief moment then espira and return the rope along the same path to the posición inicial mientras contracting your tríceps.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Skullcrushers or Bench Dips.

instructions_en: Attach two handles to a low cable pulley and place a mat in front of it. Lay down on your back and securely put the handles over your toes.

Lift your feet off the ground so that your knees and hips are both at 90 degrees and place your hands on your temples. Tip: Try not to pull your neck or head in to the movement with your hands. If your neck starts to ache, put one hand behind your head for support and to take some weight.
Now exhale and whilst crunching your up torso upward, bring your knees in towards your chest.
Once your abs are as tight as they can be pause for a brief moment, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Jack-Knives.
instructions_es: Sujeta two asas to a low polea pulley and place a mat in front of it. Túmbate down on your espalda and securely put the asas over your toes.

Lift your pies off the ground so that your rodillas and caderas are both at 90 degrees and place your manos on your temples. Consejo: Try not to pull your neck or cabeza in to the movimiento with your manos. If your neck starts to ache, put one mano behind your cabeza for support and to take some peso.
Now espira and mientras crunching your up torso upward, bring your rodillas in hacia your pecho.
Once your abs are as tight as they can be pause for a brief moment, inspira and return your body espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: Cocoons or Jack-Knives.

instructions_en: Remove the handles from two parallel cables. Adjust the height of the pulleys so they are above your head and adopt a standing, shoulder width stance between them.

Once you have done this take hold of the left cable with your right hand and the right cable with your left hand. Your arms should be at full extension with a slight bend at your elbows. This will be your starting position.

Now exhale and pull the cables back (crossing the cables over and keeping them around shoulder height) on a wide arcing motion. Tip: You should be leaning backward to help lift the weights nor should your back come out of a straight position.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your hands to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Rear Delt Flyes or Rear Delt Flyes (Machine).
instructions_es: Remove the asas from two parallel poleas. Adjust the height of the pulleys so they are above your cabeza and adopt a standing, hombro width stance between them.

Once you have done this take hold of the left polea with your right mano and the right polea with your left mano. Your brazos should be at full extension with a slight bend at your codos. Esta será la posición inicial.

Now espira and pull the poleas espalda (crossing the poleas over and keeping them around hombro height) on a wide arcing motion. Consejo: You should be leaning espaldaward to help lift the pesos nor should your espalda come out of a straight posición.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your manos to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Seated Rear Delt Flyes or Rear Delt Flyes (Machine).

instructions_en: Attach a bar to a high cable pulley, adopt a shoulder width, upright stance and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palms facing down). Take a step backwards (around 2 feet or so) and bend slightly forward from your waist whilst maintaining a straight back. Pull the weight down with straight arms so that they are now parallel with the floor. Tip: Keep a slight bend at your elbows throughout. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and pull the bar downwards towards your thighs whilst maintaining both your posture and straight arms. Contract your lats to make this movement happen. Continue to pull the bar downwards towards your thighs until the bar is just a few centimetres away from them.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Dumbbell Pull Overs or Bent Arm Barbell Pullover.
instructions_es: Sujeta a barra to a high polea pulley, adopt a hombro width, upright stance and take hold of the barra with an overmano grip (palms facing down). Take a step espaldawards (around 2 pies or so) and bend slightly forward from your waist mientras maintaining a straight espalda. Pull the peso down with straight brazos so that they are now parallel with the suelo. Consejo: Mantén a slight bend at your codos throughout. Esta será la posición inicial.

Espira and pull the barra downwards hacia your thighs mientras maintaining both your posture and straight brazos. Contract your dorsales to make this movimiento happen. Continue to pull the barra downwards hacia your thighs until the barra is just a few centimetres away from them.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: mancuerna Pull Overs or Bent Arm barra Pullover.

instructions_en: Place the preacher curl machine in front of a low cable pulley (with the bar attachment on) and take a seat. Place your upper arms over the pad of the machine and grab hold of the bar with your palms facing forward. Set the height of the seat so that your arm pits are snug on top of the pad and have your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and contract your biceps to lift the bar up towards your shoulders. Keep your triceps on the pad and squeeze your biceps until they are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly lower the bar along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Curls or Barbell Preacher Curl.
instructions_es: Coloca the preacher curl máquina in front of a low polea pulley (with the barra attachment on) and take a seat. Coloca your upper brazos over the pad of the máquina and grab hold of the barra with your palms facing forward. Coloca the height of the seat so that your brazo pits are snug on top of the pad and have your brazos extended. Esta será la posición inicial.
Espira and contract your bíceps to lift the barra up hacia your hombros. Mantén your tríceps on the pad and squeeze your bíceps until they are fully contracted and the barra is at hombro height.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and slowly lower the barra along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Polea Curls or barra Preacher Curl.

instructions_en: Attach a handle to a high cable pulley. Adopt a shoulder width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the handle with an overhand grip (palm facing the floor).

Once you have hold of the handle, take the weight by tucking your elbow into the side of your torso. Your forearm and upper arm should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and push the handle down towards your side with an arcing motion. Use your tricep to do this and contract fully when your arm is by your side. At this point, your arm should be perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbow tucked in to your side as only the forearm should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Tricep Kickbacks or Tricep Rope Extensions.
name_es: A una mano polea tríceps Extensions
instructions_es: Sujeta a asa to a high polea pulley. Adopt a hombro width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the máquina) and take hold of the asa with an overmano grip (palm facing the suelo).

Once you have hold of the asa, take the peso by tucking your codo into the side of your torso. Your forebrazo and upper brazo should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and push the asa down hacia your side with an arcing motion. Use your tricep to do this and contract fully when your brazo is by your side. At this point, your brazo should be perpendicular to the suelo. Consejo: Mantén your codo tucked in to your side as only the forebrazo should move.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap brazos.
Variaciones: Tricep Kickespaldas or Tricep Rope Extensions.

instructions_en: Place a bar attachment onto a low cable pulley and place a flat bench facing away from it. Lay down on the bench with your head at the cable end. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing away from you) and press the bar straight up towards the ceiling. Keep your elbows as close together as you can to initiate maximum tricep activity. This will be your starting position.
Inhale as you descend the bar towards your forehead. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forehead pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the bar to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Kickbacks or Tricep Rope Extenions.
instructions_es: Coloca a barra attachment onto a low polea pulley and place a flat banco facing away from it. Túmbate down on the banco with your cabeza at the polea end. Adopt an overmano grip (palms facing away from you) and press the barra straight up hacia the techo. Mantén your codos as close together as you can to initiate maximum tricep activity. Esta será la posición inicial.
Inspira as you descend the barra hacia your forecabeza. Be sure to keep your upper brazos stationary and your codos tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forecabeza pause for a second.
Then mientras exhaling, use your tríceps to return the barra to the posición inicial. Your brazos should be fully extended once again and pointing hacia the techo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Tricep Kickespaldas or Tricep Rope Extenions.

instructions_en: Place a handle attachment onto a low cable pulley. Stand side on to the machine with your right side being closest. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position, maintaining a straight back throughout. Reach across your body and take hold of the handle with your left hand. Return to your original, standing position. This will be your starting position.

Initiate the movement by exhaling and elevating your left hand on a wide arc out to your side. Keep a slight bend at your elbow and continue to elevate upward until your arm is parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your arm along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Dumbbell Lateral Raises or Dynaband Lateral Raises.
instructions_es: Coloca a asa attachment onto a low polea pulley. Colócate de pie side on to the máquina with your right side being closest. Adopt a hombro width, upright standing posición, maintaining a straight espalda throughout. Reach across your body and take hold of the asa with your left mano. Return to your original, standing posición. Esta será la posición inicial.

Initiate the movimiento by exhaling and elevating your left mano on a wide arc out to your side. Mantén a slight bend at your codo and continue to elevate upward until your brazo is parallel with the suelo.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your brazo along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variación: mancuerna Lateral Raises or Dynabanda Lateral Raises.

instructions_en: Connect a rope attachment to a tower, and move the cable to the lowest pulley position. Stand with your side to the cable with a wide stance, and grab the rope with both hands.
Twist your body away from the pulley as you bring the rope over your shoulder like you’re performing a judo flip.
Shift your weight between your feet as you twist and crunch forward, pulling the cable downward.
Return to the starting position and repeat until failure.
Then, reposition and repeat the same series of movements on the opposite side.

Tip: Although this should be one continuous movement, think of it as two separate ab movements: the twist for obliques and the crunch for abs. This will help with the mind-muscle connection. Also, over exaggerate the end of the crunch by pausing for a moment and clinching your abs in an isometric hold before releasing.
instructions_es: Connect a rope attachment to a tower, and move the polea to the lowest pulley posición. Colócate de pie with your side to the polea with a wide stance, and grab the rope with both manos.
Twist your body away from the pulley as you bring the rope over your hombro like you’re performing a judo flip.
Shift your peso between your pies as you twist and crunch forward, pulling the polea downward.
Return to the posición inicial and repeat until failure.
Then, reposición and repeat the same series of movimientos on the opposite side.

Consejo: Although this should be one continuous movimiento, think of it as two separate ab movimientos: the twist for obliques and the crunch for abs. This will help with the mind-muscle connection. Also, over exaggerate the end of the crunch by pausing for a moment and clinching your abs in an isometric hold before releasing.

instructions_en: Place handle attachments on two high parallel cable pulleys. Once you have done this, stand inbetween the cables (facing forward) and grab one in a each hand. Have a shoulder width, upright stance with your back straight and elbows slightly bent. Your head should be up and your chest pushed out. Your position should now resemble a 'T'. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your arms out wide, exhale and bring your hands down towards the middle of your hips on two wide arcing paths. Tip: Your pectoral muscles should be initiating this movement but only your arms should be moving.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your hands back along the same paths towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Pec Deck.
instructions_es: Coloca asa attachments on two high parallel polea pulleys. Once you have done this, stand inbetween the poleas (facing forward) and grab one in a each mano. Have a hombro width, upright stance with your espalda straight and codos slightly bent. Your cabeza should be up and your pecho pushed out. Your posición should now resemble a 'T'. Esta será la posición inicial.

Manténing your brazos out wide, espira and bring your manos down hacia the middle of your caderas on two wide arcing paths. Consejo: Your pectoral muscles should be initiating this movimiento but only your brazos should be moving.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your manos espalda along the same paths hacia the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Flyes or Pec Deck.

instructions_en: Attach a handle to the cable and adjust the height of the pulley so that it sits at belly button height. Stand side on to the machine and take a step away. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position and take hold of the handle with the hand nearest the machine. Once you have hold of the handle, tuck your elbow in close to your torso (your elbow should be at a 90 degree angle). This will be your starting position.

Exhale and rotate your hand on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your elbow which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your shoulder fully so that your hand is close to the opposite side of your body.
After a brief pause, return the handle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Caution: Be cautious with the weight as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variations: Dumbbell Internal Rotations or Dynaband Internal Rotations
instructions_es: Sujeta a asa to the polea and adjust the height of the pulley so that it sits at belly button height. Colócate de pie side on to the máquina and take a step away. Adopt a hombro width, upright standing posición and take hold of the asa with the mano nearest the máquina. Once you have hold of the asa, tuck your codo in close to your torso (your codo should be at a 90 degree angle). Esta será la posición inicial.

Espira and rotate your mano on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your codo which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your hombro fully so that your mano is close to the opposite side of your body.
Tras una breve pausa, return the asa along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap brazos.
Precaución: Be cautious with the peso as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variaciones: mancuerna Internal Rotations or Dynabanda Internal Rotations

name_en: Incline Cable Tricep Extensions V Bar Attachment
instructions_en: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is at the top of its runner and set the weight accordingly. Place an incline bench in front of the cable but facing away from the machine. Next, attach a 'V' bar to the cable and lay on the bench (chest facing the ceiling) that is set to an incline angle of around 30-45 degrees. Extend your arms vertically towards the ceiling and take an overhand grip of the 'V' bar. Your palms should now be facing forwards. Bend your elbows so that they are tucked in and are at a 90 degree angle. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and extend your arms out and away from your body on a wide arcing motion. Continue to press the weight away from your body until your arms are fully extended and your triceps are fully contracted. Tip: Keep your elbows as close together as possible throughout the movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Kickbacks or Tricep Extension (Rope).
name_es: Inclinado polea tríceps Extensions V Bar Attachment
instructions_es: Adjust a polea pulley so that it is at the top of its runner and set the peso accordingly. Coloca an incline banco in front of the polea but facing away from the máquina. Next, attach a 'V' barra to the polea and lay on the banco (pecho facing the techo) that is set to an incline angle of around 30-45 degrees. Extend your brazos vertically hacia the techo and take an overmano grip of the 'V' barra. Your palms should now be facing forwards. Bend your codos so that they are tucked in and are at a 90 degree angle. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and extend your brazos out and away from your body on a wide arcing motion. Continue to press the peso away from your body until your brazos are fully extended and your tríceps are fully contracted. Consejo: Mantén your codos as close together as possible throughout the movimiento.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Kickespaldas or Tricep Extension (Rope).

instructions_en: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is at the top of its runner and set the weight accordingly. Place an incline bench in front of the cable but facing away from the machine. Next, attach a 'V' bar to the cable and lay on the bench (chest facing the ceiling) that is set to an incline angle of around 30 degrees. Extend your arms vertically towards the ceiling and take an overhand grip of the 'V' bar. Your palms should now be facing forwards. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your arms down towards your thighs (whilst keeping them extended throughout) on a wide arcing motion. Continue to pull the weight down towards your thighs until your arms are parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Pullover or Bent-Arm Barbell Pullover.
instructions_es: Adjust a polea pulley so that it is at the top of its runner and set the peso accordingly. Coloca an incline banco in front of the polea but facing away from the máquina. Next, attach a 'V' barra to the polea and lay on the banco (pecho facing the techo) that is set to an incline angle of around 30 degrees. Extend your brazos vertically hacia the techo and take an overmano grip of the 'V' barra. Your palms should now be facing forwards. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull your brazos down hacia your thighs (mientras keeping them extended throughout) on a wide arcing motion. Continue to pull the peso down hacia your thighs until your brazos are parallel with the suelo.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Polea Pullover or Bent-Arm barra Pullover.

instructions_en: Attach an ankle cuff to a low pulley. Stand side on to the pulley system and attach the cuff to the ankle nearest the cable.

Once you have done this take a large step away from the cable pulley. Now have your weight on the leg that the cuff is not attached to (the furthest foot away from the machine). If you need to hold onto something for stability, you can do so.
Allow your ankle (which the cable is attached to) to be pulled towards the machine. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and move the weight loaded ankle across your body (away from the machine) and in front of your standing foot using your inner thigh muscles.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the ankle along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap ankles.
Variation: Adductor Machine or Leg Press (Wide Stance).
instructions_es: Sujeta an ankle cuff to a low pulley. Colócate de pie side on to the pulley system and attach the cuff to the ankle nearest the polea.

Once you have done this take a large step away from the polea pulley. Now have your peso on the leg that the cuff is not attached to (the furthest pie away from the máquina). If you need to hold onto something for stability, you can do so.
Allow your ankle (which the polea is attached to) to be pulled hacia the máquina. Esta será la posición inicial.
Espira and move the peso loaded ankle across your body (away from the máquina) and in front of your standing pie using your inner thigh muscles.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the ankle along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap ankles.
Variación: Adductor Machine or Leg Press (Wide Stance).

instructions_en: Attach a rope to a low cable pulley. Take hold of the ropes with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) making sure that the plastic/rubber part on the end is touching your thumbs and index fingers. Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the rope up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the the rope is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the rope along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Seated Hammer Curls.
instructions_es: Sujeta a rope to a low polea pulley. Take hold of the ropes with a agarre neutro (palms facing each other) making sure that the plastic/rubber part on the end is touching your thumbs and index fingers. Colócate de pie upright around 12 inches away from the polea, maintaining a straight espalda throughout.

Whilst holding the upper brazo stationary, espira as you curl the rope up hacia your hombros by contracting your bíceps. Continue the movimiento until your bíceps are fully contracted and the the rope is at hombro level. Hold the contracted posición for a second as you squeeze your bíceps.
(Consejo: Only the forebrazos should move.)
Inspira as you slowly begin to return the rope along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Colócate de pieing Hammer Curls or Seated Hammer Curls.

instructions_en: Adjust two opposing cable pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the weights accordingly. Position yourself in between these runners with a shoulder width stance. Attach a bar to each cable and (whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back)), bend at your knees and hips to lower your torso, enabling you to take hold of the bar. This will be the starting position of the exercise.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously using the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. Once you are in a standing position you should push your chest out by pulling your shoulder blades together.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Hex Bar Deadlifts or Barbell Deadlifts.
instructions_es: Adjust two opposing polea pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the pesos accordingly. Position yourself in between these runners with a hombro width stance. Sujeta a barra to each polea and (mientras maintaining good posture (a straight espalda)), bend at your rodillas and caderas to lower your torso, enabling you to take hold of the barra. This will be the posición inicial of the exercise.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and press through your talones and cuádriceps mientras simultaneously using the muscles in your espalda to bring your torso into a vertical posición. Once you are in a standing posición you should push your pecho out by pulling your hombro blades together.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Hex Bar Deadlifts or barra Deadlifts.

instructions_en: Adopt a kneeling position underneath a high cable with a rope attached. When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your lower back and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Crunches or Cocoons.
instructions_es: Adopt a rodillaling posición underneath a high polea with a rope attached. When setting the peso for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your zona lumbar will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your cabeza on your upper pecho. Push your caderas espalda and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your zona lumbar and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your espalda by taking a deep breath, pulling your hombros espalda and pushing your pecho out. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Throughout this movimiento your caderas and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Espira and flex your abs to move your hombros (and rope) downward hacia your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your espalda reverses so that your espalda is now rounding over. Your codos should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return along the same path to your posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: If you suffer from zona lumbar pain, be cautious of the resistencia.
Variaciones: Crunches or Cocoons.

instructions_en: Attach handles to two cables (placed at shoulder height). Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles up to shoulder height with your elbows parallel with the floor, flared out wide at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance, maintaining a straight back troughout the movement. Your palms should be facing the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press the handles in front of you until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight) and bring your hands together.
After a brief pause and squeeze of your pectoral muscles, return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Chest Press or Chest Press Machine
instructions_es: Sujeta asas to two poleas (placed at hombro height). Take one in each mano and face away from the máquina. Bring the asas up to hombro height with your codos parallel with the suelo, flared out wide at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, hombro width stance, maintaining a straight espalda troughout the movimiento. Your palms should be facing the suelo. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, press the asas in front of you until your codo becomes fully extended (straight) and bring your manos together.
Tras una breve pausa and squeeze of your pectoral muscles, return the asas espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variaciones: mancuerna Chest Press or Chest Press Machine

name_en: Bosu Ball Cable Crunch With Side Bends
instructions_en: Connect a standard handle to each arm of a cable machine, and position them in the most downward position.
Grab a Bosu Ball and position it in front and center of the cable machine.
Lie down on the Bosu Ball with the small of your back arched around the ball. Your rear end should be close to the floor without touching it.
With both hands, reach back and grab the handle of each cable.
With your feet positioned in a wide stance, extend your arms straight out in front of you and in between your knees. Your hands should be at knee level.
Keep your arms straight and in-line with the upward angle of the cable. Elevate your torso in a crunching motion without dropping or bending your arms.
Maintain the rigid position with your arms. Slowly descend back to the starting position with your back arched around the Bosu Ball and your abdominals elongated.
Repeat the same series of movements to failure.
Once you reach failure, keep your abs tight and raise your torso into plank position so your back is elevated off the Bosu Ball.
Lower your arms down to your side; keep them straight. Start doing alternating side bends; reach for your heels! This finishing movement will focus on your obliques.

Tip: Arch your back around the Bosu Ball before each rep to fully elongate your abdominals. This will provide a full range of motion and lengthen your muscle fibers, giving them a much fuller appearance.
name_es: Bosu Ball polea Crunch With Side Bends
instructions_es: Connect a standard asa to each brazo of a polea máquina, and posición them in the most downward posición.
Coge a Bosu Ball and posición it in front and center of the polea máquina.
Túmbate down on the Bosu Ball with the small of your espalda arched around the ball. Your rear end should be close to the suelo without touching it.
With both manos, reach espalda and grab the asa of each polea.
With your pies posicióned in a wide stance, extend your brazos straight out in front of you and in between your rodillas. Your manos should be at rodilla level.
Mantén your brazos straight and in-line with the upward angle of the polea. Elevate your torso in a crunching motion without dropping or bending your brazos.
Mantén the rigid posición with your brazos. Slowly descend espalda to the posición inicial with your espalda arched around the Bosu Ball and your abdominals elongated.
Repeat the same series of movimientos to failure.
Once you reach failure, keep your abs tight and raise your torso into plank posición so your espalda is elevated off the Bosu Ball.
Lower your brazos down to your side; keep them straight. Start doing alternating side bends; reach for your talones! This finishing movimiento will focus on your obliques.

Consejo: Arch your espalda around the Bosu Ball before each rep to fully elongate your abdominals. This will provide a full range of motion and lengthen your muscle fibers, giving them a much fuller appearance.

name_en: Bent Over Single Arm Low Cable Rear Delt Flyes
instructions_en: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is at the bottom of its runner with a handle attached. Stand with your right side adjacent to the runner and take hold of the handle with an underhand grip in your left hand. Bend at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back so that your torso is just off parallel with the floor. Your right arm should be in a neutral position so that it does not interfere with the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the back of your left hand up and out, on a wide arcing motion, away from the pulley and towards the ceiling. Continue to pull until your arm is parallel to the floor. To do so, use the muscles in the back of your shoulder joint and across the top of your back. Tip: Maintain your posture throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Rear Delt Machine Flyes or Face Pulls.
name_es: Bent Over a una mano Low polea deltoide posterior aperturas
instructions_es: Adjust a polea pulley so that it is at the bottom of its runner with a asa attached. Colócate de pie with your right side adjacent to the runner and take hold of the asa with an undermano grip in your left mano. Bend at your rodillas and waist (more so at your waist) mientras maintaining a straight espalda so that your torso is just off parallel with the suelo. Your right brazo should be in a neutral posición so that it does not interfere with the movimiento. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull the espalda of your left mano up and out, on a wide arcing motion, away from the pulley and hacia the techo. Continue to pull until your brazo is parallel to the suelo. To do so, use the muscles in the espalda of your hombro joint and across the top of your espalda. Consejo: Mantén your posture throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: Rear Delt Machine Flyes or Face Pulls.

instructions_en: Attach handles to two low cables. Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles up to shoulder height with your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance, maintaining a straight back troughout the movement. Your palms should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press one of the handles towards the ceiling until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight). Keep your other arm stationary in the starting position.
After a brief pause, return the handle back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side and alternate between arms.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Alternating Shoulder Press or See-Saw Press.
name_es: De pie Alternating polea press de hombro
instructions_es: Sujeta asas to two low poleas. Take one in each mano and face away from the máquina. Bring the asas up to hombro height with your codos are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, hombro width stance, maintaining a straight espalda troughout the movimiento. Your palms should be facing forward. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, press one of the asas hacia the techo until your codo becomes fully extended (straight). Mantén your other brazo stationary in the posición inicial.
Tras una breve pausa, return the asa espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repeat for the opposite side and alternate between brazos.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variaciones: Colócate de pieing Alternating Shoulder Press or See-Saw Press.

instructions_en: Position two equally loaded barbells on the ground next to each other. Ensure they are able to roll.
Assume a push-up position over the bars, supporting your weight on your toes and hands with your arms extended and body straight.
Place your hands on the bars. This will be your starting position.
Using a slow and controlled motion, move your hands away from the midline of your body, rolling the bars apart. Inhale during this portion of the motion.
After moving the bars as far apart as you can, return to the starting position by pulling them back together. Exhale as you perform this movement.
instructions_es: Position two equally loaded barraras on the ground next to each other. Ensure they are able to roll.
Assume a push-up posición over the barras, supporting your peso on your toes and manos with your brazos extended and body straight.
Coloca your manos on the barras. Esta será la posición inicial.
Using a slow and controlled motion, move your manos away from the midline of your body, rolling the barras apart. Inspira during this portion of the motion.
After moving the barras as far apart as you can, return to the posición inicial by pulling them espalda together. Espira as you perform this movimiento.

instructions_en: Hold a barbell with both hands and your palms facing down; hands spaced about shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Alternating between each of your hands, perform the movement by extending the wrist as though you were rolling up a newspaper. Continue alternating back and forth until failure.
Reverse the motion by flexing the wrist, rolling the opposite direction. Continue the alternating motion until failure.
instructions_es: Hold a barrara with both manos and your palms facing down; manos spaced about hombro width. Esta será la posición inicial.
Alternating between each of your manos, perform the movimiento by extending the wrist as though you were rolling up a newspaper. Continue alternating espalda and forth until failure.
Reverse the motion by flexing the wrist, rolling the opposite direction. Continue the alternating motion until failure.

instructions_en: Place a loaded barbell in front of you and adopt a wide stance. Have your shins gently touching the barbell, lean forward from your hips to take an overhand, narrow grip (index fingers 6-12 inches apart). Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor, a slight bend at your knees and remember to maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, exhale as you drive through your heels to elevate the barbell. You should be pulling through your hamstrings and driving your hips forward at the same time to lift the bar up into a standing position.

After a brief pause in this standing position, lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the barbell close to you as you go. Push your glutes back to help lower the bar towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Inhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Deadlifts.
instructions_es: Coloca a loaded barrara in front of you and adopt a wide stance. Have your shins gently touching the barrara, lean forward from your caderas to take an overmano, agarre cerrado (index fingers 6-12 inches apart). Allow your brazos to hang perpendicular to the suelo, a slight bend at your rodillas and remember to maintain a straight espalda throughout. Esta será la posición inicial.

Whilst keeping your rodillas stationary, espira as you drive through your talones to elevate the barrara. You should be pulling through your isquios and driving your caderas forward at the same time to lift the barra up into a standing posición.

Tras una breve pausa in this standing posición, lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight espalda), keeping the barrara close to you as you go. Push your glúteos espalda to help lower the barra hacia your pies until you feel a stretch in your isquios. Consejo: Remember, this whole movimiento is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the rodilla, but no more) and a straight espalda throughout. Inspira as you perform this part of the movimiento.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: This is not an exercise for those with espalda issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variación: mancuerna Stiff Legged Deadlifts.

instructions_en: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the bar and take the weight across your shoulders whilst maintaining a straight back and a small bend at your knees. Press through your legs to lift the bar and take a small step backwards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Kettlebell Squats.
instructions_es: Coloca the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barrara can lay across your hombros comfortably. Next, set the safety barras at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the peso and you will be safe. Load up the barrara with the correct amount of peso on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the barra and take the peso across your hombros mientras maintaining a straight espalda and a small bend at your rodillas. Press through your legs to lift the barra and take a small step espaldawards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Mantén a straight espalda throughout the movimiento and keep your cabeza up. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and begin to descend by bending at your rodillas and caderas. Your peso should be put predominantly through your talones as you sit espalda into the movimiento until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the suelo.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barra to the posición inicial along the same path, push through your talones with the force being driven through your cuádriceps and glúteos to do so. Colócate de pie to attention with your legs fully extended, espalda straight and hombros relaxed.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: This is a very complex movimiento and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your pesos. If you suffer from espalda issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variaciones: mancuerna Squats or Kettlebell Squats.

instructions_en: Lie down on a decline bench with both legs securely locked in position.  Reach for the barbell behind the head using a pronated grip (palms facing out).  Make sure to grab the barbell wider than shoulder width apart for this exercise.  Slowly lift the barbell up from the floor by using your arms.
When positioned properly, your arms should be fully extended and perpendicular to the floor.  This is the starting position.

Begin by moving the barbell back down in a semicircular motion as if you were going to place it on the floor, but instead, stop when the arms are parallel to the floor.  Tip: Keep the arms fully extended at all times.  The movement should only happen at the shoulder joint.  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Now bring the barbell up while exhaling until you are back at the starting position.  Remember to keep full control of the barbell at all times.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
When finished with your set, slowly lower the barbell back down until it is level with your head and release it.
Caution: It is a good idea to have a spotter for this exercise.
Variations: You can also use an EZ bar or dumbbells to perform this movement.
instructions_es: Túmbate down on a decline banco with both legs securely locked in posición.  Reach for the barrara behind the cabeza using a pronated grip (palms facing out).  Make sure to grab the barrara wider than hombro width apart for this exercise.  Slowly lift the barrara up from the suelo by using your brazos.
When posicióned properly, your brazos should be fully extended and perpendicular to the suelo.  This is the posición inicial.

Empieza by moving the barrara espalda down in a semicircular motion as if you were going to place it on the suelo, but instead, stop when the brazos are parallel to the suelo.  Consejo: Mantén the brazos fully extended at all times.  The movimiento should only happen at the hombro joint.  Inspira as you perform this portion of the movimiento.
Now bring the barrara up while exhaling until you are espalda at the posición inicial.  Remember to keep full control of the barrara at all times.
Repeat the movimiento for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
When finished with your set, slowly lower the barrara espalda down until it is level with your cabeza and release it.
Precaución: It is a good idea to have a spotter for this exercise.
Variaciones: You can also use an EZ barra or mancuernas to perform this movimiento.

instructions_en: Lie back on a decline bench with the feet securely locked at the front of the bench.  Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each hand), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked.  The bar will be perpendicular to the torso and the floor.  This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your lower chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles.  Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again.  Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Caution:
If you are new at this exercise, it is advised that you use a spotter.  If no spotter is available, then be conservative with the amount of weight used.
Also, beware of letting the bar drift too far forward.  You want the bar to fall on your middle chest and nowhere else.
Don't bounce the weight off your chest.  You should be in full control of the barbell at all times.
Variations: You can use dumbbells for this exercise as well as exercise bands.
Same as the Decline Barbell Bench Press but with a wider grip.
name_es: Wide-Grip declinado barra press de banca
instructions_es: Túmbate espalda on a decline banco with the pies securely locked at the front of the banco.  Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from hombro width (for each mano), lift the barra from the rack and hold it straight over you with your brazos locked.  The barra will be perpendicular to the torso and the suelo.  Esta será la posición inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the barra on your lower pecho.

After a second pause, bring the barra espalda to the posición inicial as you breathe out and push the barra using your pecho muscles.  Lock your brazos and squeeze your pecho in the contracted posición, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again.  Consejo: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movimiento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Precaución:
If you are new at this exercise, it is advised that you use a spotter.  If no spotter is available, then be conservative with the amount of peso used.
Also, beware of letting the barra drift too far forward.  You want the barra to fall on your middle pecho and nowhere else.
Don't bounce the peso off your pecho.  You should be in full control of the barrara at all times.
Variaciones: You can use mancuernas for this exercise as well as exercise bandas.
Same as the Decline barra Bench Press but with a wider grip.

instructions_en: Lie back on a flat bench with feet firm on the floor.  Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from shoulder width (for each hand), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked.  The bar will be perpendicular to the torso and the floor.  This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle chest.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your chest muscles.  Lock your arms and squeeze your chest in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again.  Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Caution:
If you are new at this exercise, it is advised that you use a spotter.  If no spotter is available, then be conservative with the amount of weight used.
Also, beware of letting the bar drift too far forward.  You want the bar to fall on your middle chest and nowhere else.
Don't bounce the weight off your chest.  You should be in full control of the barbell at all times.
Variations: You can use dumbbells for this exercise as well as exercise bands.
Same as the Barbell Bench Press but with a different grip.
instructions_es: Túmbate espalda on a flat banco with pies firm on the suelo.  Using a wide, pronated (palms forward) grip that is around 3 inches away from hombro width (for each mano), lift the barra from the rack and hold it straight over you with your brazos locked.  The barra will be perpendicular to the torso and the suelo.  Esta será la posición inicial.
As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the barra on your middle pecho.

After a second pause, bring the barra espalda to the posición inicial as you breathe out and push the barra using your pecho muscles.  Lock your brazos and squeeze your pecho in the contracted posición, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again.  Consejo: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movimiento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Precaución:

Also, beware of letting the barra drift too far forward.  You want the barra to fall on your middle pecho and nowhere else.
Don't bounce the peso off your pecho.  You should be in full control of the barrara at all times.
Variaciones: You can use mancuernas for this exercise as well as exercise bandas.
Same as the barra Bench Press but with a different grip.

instructions_en: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.
Step underneath the bar so that it is resting on your shoulders. Take hold of the bar and step back from the rack maintaining a straight back throughout.This will be your starting position.

Inahle and take a slightly exaggerated step forwardand plant your foot firmly on the floor. Whilst maintaining a stragiht back descend your torso towards the floor by bending both knees into a 90 degree position. Tip: Keep your weight central and drop directly downward rather than forward or back, your knees should be at right angles when at the bottom of the movement.
After a brief pause press through your front thigh and heel to push your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Alternate in this fashion and repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any balance issues, you should use an alternative method of adding weight to this exercise. For example, use dumbbells.
Variations: Alternating Dumbbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.
instructions_es: Coloca the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barrara can lay across your hombros comfortably. Next, set the safety barras at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the peso and you will be safe. Load up the barrara with the correct amount of peso on it and you are now ready to go.
Step underneath the barra so that it is resting on your hombros. Take hold of the barra and step espalda from the rack maintaining a straight espalda throughout.Esta será la posición inicial.

Inahle and take a slightly exaggerated step forwardand plant your pie firmly on the suelo. Whilst maintaining a stragiht espalda descend your torso hacia the suelo by bending both rodillas into a 90 degree posición. Consejo: Mantén your peso central and drop directly downward rather than forward or espalda, your rodillas should be at right angles when at the bottom of the movimiento.
Tras una breve pausa press through your front thigh and talón to push your body espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.
Alternate in this fashion and repeat the movimiento for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Precaución: If you have any balance issues, you should use an alternative method of adding peso to this exercise. For example, use mancuernas.
Variaciones: Alternating mancuerna Lunges or mancuerna Walking Lunges.

instructions_en: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the bar and take the weight across your shoulders whilst maintaining a straight back and a small bend at your knees. Press through your legs to lift the bar and take a small step backwards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, aggressively push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Driving your hips forward is key in this movement as that will help to give you lift from the ground. Just before you reach a standing position, jump as high as you can.
Land softly at your knees by going straight into the next repetition. If you are at the end of your set, remember to allow a bend at the knees to soften the landing.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squat Jumps or Kettlebell Squat Jumps.
