Step underneath the barra and take the peso across your hombros mientras maintaining a straight espalda and a small bend at your rodillas. Press through your legs to lift the barra and take a small step espaldawards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a hombro width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Mantén a straight espalda throughout the movimiento and keep your cabeza up. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and begin to descend by bending at your rodillas and caderas. Your peso should be put predominantly through your talones as you sit espalda into the movimiento until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the suelo.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barra to the posición inicial along the same path, aggressively push through your talones with the force being driven through your cuádriceps and glúteos to do so. Driving your caderas forward is key in this movimiento as that will help to give you lift from the ground. Just before you reach a standing posición, jump as high as you can.
Land softly at your rodillas by going straight into the next repetition. If you are at the end of your set, remember to allow a bend at the rodillas to soften the landing.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: If you suffer from espalda issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variaciones: mancuerna Squat Jumps or Kettlebell Squat Jumps.

instructions_en: Grab a barbell with a narrow, overhand grip. Adopt a standing position with the barbell resting against your thighs, your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the bar as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the barbell up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to pull the barbell upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbows should be above the bar.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the barbell along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell Upright Rows or Smith Machine Upright Row
instructions_es: Coge a barrara with a narrow, overmano grip. Adopt a standing posición with the barrara resting against your thighs, your brazos hanging perpendicular to the suelo. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Mantén a straight espalda and keep the barra as close to your body as possible throughout the movimiento.

Espira and pull the barrara up hacia your chin by contracting your hombros and flaring your codos out wide. Continue to pull the barrara upward until you reach your chin. At this point your codos should be above the barra.
Pause for a brief moment, then inspira and return the barrara along the same path hacia the posición inicial.
Variaciones: mancuerna Upright Rows or multipower Upright Row

instructions_en: Load up the T-Bar barbell with the desired amount of weight and take your stance either side of the bar. Take hold of the handles with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip by bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the barbell in towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/ biceps.
Once the barbell is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your back are as tight as they can be, inhale and return the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Barbell Row or Seated Row Machine (Overhand Grip).
instructions_es: Load up the T-Bar barrara with the desired amount of peso and take your stance either side of the barra. Take hold of the asas with a wider than hombro width, overmano grip by bending at your rodillas and waist (more so at your waist) mientras maintaining a straight espalda. Your brazos should be hanging perpendicular to the suelo at this point. Esta es la posición inicial.
Espira and squeeze the muscles in your espalda to bring the barrara in hacia your torso. Bend at the codo to allow the movimiento but try not to take any peso through your forebrazos/ bíceps.

Once the barrara is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your espalda are as tight as they can be, inspira and return the barrara along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any espalda pain/injuries.
Variaciones: Bent Over barra Row or Seated Row Machine (Overmano Grip).

instructions_en: Begin in a standing position.

Press two lightweight plates together with your hands. Hold the plates together close to your chest to create an isometric contraction in your chest muscles. Your fingers should be pointed forward. This is your starting position.
Squeeze the plates between your palms and extend your arms directly out in front of you in a controlled motion.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then slowly return to the starting position.
instructions_es: Empieza in a standing posición.

Press two lightpeso plates together with your manos. Hold the plates together close to your pecho to create an isometric contraction in your pecho muscles. Your fingers should be pointed forward. Esta es la posición inicial.
Squeeze the plates between your palms and extend your brazos directly out in front of you in a controlled motion.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then slowly return to the posición inicial.

instructions_en: Place a loaded barbell in front of you and adopt a wide stance. Have your shins gently touching the barbell, lean forward from your hips to take an overhand, narrow grip (index fingers 6-12 inches apart). Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor, a slight bend at your knees and remember to maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, exhale as you drive through your heels to elevate the barbell. You should be pulling through your hamstrings and driving your hips forward at the same time to lift the bar up into a standing position.

After a brief pause in this standing position, lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the barbell close to you as you go. Push your glutes back to help lower the bar towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Inhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Deadlifts.
instructions_es: Coloca a loaded barrara in front of you and adopt a wide stance. Have your shins gently touching the barrara, lean forward from your caderas to take an overmano, agarre cerrado (index fingers 6-12 inches apart). Allow your brazos to hang perpendicular to the suelo, a slight bend at your rodillas and remember to maintain a straight espalda throughout. Esta será la posición inicial.

Whilst keeping your rodillas stationary, espira as you drive through your talones to elevate the barrara. You should be pulling through your isquios and driving your caderas forward at the same time to lift the barra up into a standing posición.

Tras una breve pausa in this standing posición, lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight espalda), keeping the barrara close to you as you go. Push your glúteos espalda to help lower the barra hacia your pies until you feel a stretch in your isquios. Consejo: Remember, this whole movimiento is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the rodilla, but no more) and a straight espalda throughout. Inspira as you perform this part of the movimiento.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: This is not an exercise for those with espalda issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variación: mancuerna Stiff Legged Deadlifts.

instructions_en: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the bar and take the weight across your shoulders whilst maintaining a straight back and a small bend at your knees. Press through your legs to lift the bar and take a small step backwards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Kettlebell Squats.
instructions_es: Coloca the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barrara can lay across your hombros comfortably. Next, set the safety barras at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the peso and you will be safe. Load up the barrara with the correct amount of peso on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the barra and take the peso across your hombros mientras maintaining a straight espalda and a small bend at your rodillas. Press through your legs to lift the barra and take a small step espaldawards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Mantén a straight espalda throughout the movimiento and keep your cabeza up. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and begin to descend by bending at your rodillas and caderas. Your peso should be put predominantly through your talones as you sit espalda into the movimiento until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the suelo.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barra to the posición inicial along the same path, push through your talones with the force being driven through your cuádriceps and glúteos to do so. Colócate de pie to attention with your legs fully extended, espalda straight and hombros relaxed.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: This is a very complex movimiento and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your pesos. If you suffer from espalda issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variaciones: mancuerna Squats or Kettlebell Squats.

instructions_en: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the bar, or just drape the middle over the bar so there is a greater weight increase as you lift. Attempt to keep the ends of the chains away from the plates so you don't hit them when you lower the weight.

Begin with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the feet. The feet should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The arms should be directly below the shoulders, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the shoulders, which in effect lengthens your arms.

Take a breath, and then lower your hips, looking forward with your head with your chest up. Drive through the floor, spreading your feet apart, with your weight on the back half of your feet. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean back and drive the hips into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Return the weight to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the weight on the way down.
instructions_es: You can attach the chains to the sleeves of the barra, or just drape the middle over the barra so there is a greater peso increase as you lift. Attempt to keep the ends of the chains away from the plates so you don't hit them when you lower the peso.

Empieza with a barra loaded on the ground. Approach the barra so that the barra intersects the middle of the pies. The pies should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the caderas to grip the barra. The brazos should be directly below the hombros, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the hombros, which in effect lengthens your brazos.

Take a breath, and then lower your caderas, looking forward with your cabeza with your pecho up. Drive through the suelo, spreading your pies apart, with your peso on the espalda half of your pies. Extend through the caderas and rodillas.
As the barra passes through the rodillas, lean espalda and drive the caderas into the barra, pulling your hombro blades together.
Return the peso to the ground by bending at the caderas and controlling the peso on the way down.

instructions_en: To deadlift with short bands, simply loop them over the bar before you start, and step into them to set up.  Ensure that they under the back half of your foot, directly where you are driving into the floor.

Begin with a bar loaded on the ground. Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the feet. The feet should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The arms should be directly below the shoulders, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip.

Take a breath, and then lower your hips, looking forward with your head with your chest up. Drive through the floor, spreading your feet apart, with your weight on the back half of your feet. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean back and drive the hips into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Return the weight to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the weight on the way down.
instructions_es: To deadlift with short bandas, simply loop them over the barra before you start, and step into them to set up.  Ensure that they under the espalda half of your pie, directly where you are driving into the suelo.

Empieza with a barra loaded on the ground. Approach the barra so that the barra intersects the middle of the pies. The pies should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the caderas to grip the barra. The brazos should be directly below the hombros, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip.

Take a breath, and then lower your caderas, looking forward with your cabeza with your pecho up. Drive through the suelo, spreading your pies apart, with your peso on the espalda half of your pies. Extend through the caderas and rodillas.
As the barra passes through the rodillas, lean espalda and drive the caderas into the barra, pulling your hombro blades together.
Return the peso to the ground by bending at the caderas and controlling the peso on the way down.

instructions_en: Load up a barbell and stand behind it with a wide stance. Your shins should be gently touching the bar.

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back), bend at your knees and hips to lower your torso enabling you to take a narrow (index finger 6-12 inches apart), overhand grip between your legs. Your hips should be higher than your knees at this point. This will be the starting position. Tip: You can adopt an alternate grip (one overhand and one underhand) if it is more comfortable for you.

Grip the bar and initiate the movement by pressing through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously use the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. Throughout the movement keep the bar close to your body, maintain strict form (straight back) and exhale. Once you are in a standing position you should push your chest out by pulling your shoulder blades together.
After a brief pause, descend the barbell back along the same path and inhale until you are back in the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any back pain, this may not be suitable movement for you.
Variation: Rack Pulls or Plie Dumbbell Squats.
instructions_es: Load up a barrara and stand behind it with a wide stance. Your shins should be gently touching the barra.

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight espalda), bend at your rodillas and caderas to lower your torso enabling you to take a narrow (index finger 6-12 inches apart), overmano grip between your legs. Your caderas should be higher than your rodillas at this point. This will be the posición inicial. Consejo: You can adopt an alternate grip (one overmano and one undermano) if it is more comfortable for you.

Grip the barra and initiate the movimiento by pressing through your talones and cuádriceps mientras simultaneously use the muscles in your espalda to bring your torso into a vertical posición. Throughout the movimiento keep the barra close to your body, maintain strict form (straight espalda) and espira. Once you are in a standing posición you should push your pecho out by pulling your hombro blades together.
Tras una breve pausa, descend the barrara espalda along the same path and inspira until you are espalda in the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any espalda pain, this may not be suitable movimiento for you.
Variación: Rack Pulls or Plie mancuerna Squats.

instructions_en: Stand to the side of a barbell next to its center. Bend your knees and lower your body until you are able to reach the barbell.

Grasp the bar as if you were grabbing a briefcase (palms facing you since the bar is sideways).  You may need a wrist wrap if you are using a significant amount of weight.  This is your starting position.
Use your legs to help lift the barbell up while exhaling.  Your arms should extend fully as bring the barbell up until you are in a standing position.
Slowly bring the barbell back down while inhaling.  Tip: Make sure to bend your knees while lowering the weight to avoid any injury from occurring.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.
Caution: This is not an exercise that is recommended for people with lower back problems.  Also, jerking motions or doing too much weight can injure your back.
Variations: The exercise can also be performed with a dumbbell as described above.
instructions_es: Colócate de pie to the side of a barrara next to its center. Bend your rodillas and lower your body until you are able to reach the barrara.

Grasp the barra as if you were grabbing a briefcase (palms facing you since the barra is sideways).  You may need a wrist wrap if you are using a significant amount of peso.  Esta es la posición inicial.
Use your legs to help lift the barrara up while exhaling.  Your brazos should extend fully as bring the barrara up until you are in a standing posición.
Slowly bring the barrara espalda down while inhaling.  Consejo: Make sure to bend your rodillas while lowering the peso to avoid any injury from occurring.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Switch brazos and repeat the movimiento.
Precaución: This is not an exercise that is recommended for people with zona lumbar problems.  Also, jerking motions or doing too much peso can injure your espalda.
Variaciones: The exercise can also be performed with a mancuerna as described above.

instructions_en: Place a bar on the ground behind the head of an incline bench.
Lay on the bench face down. With a pronated grip, pick the barbell up from the floor, keeping your arms straight. Allow the bar to hang straight down. This will be your starting position.
To begin, raise the barbell out in front of your head while keeping your arms extended.
Return to the starting position.
instructions_es: Coloca a barra on the ground behind the cabeza of an incline banco.
Túmbate on the banco boca abajo. With a pronated grip, pick the barrara up from the suelo, keeping your brazos straight. Allow the barra to hang straight down. Esta será la posición inicial.
To begin, raise the barrara out in front of your cabeza while keeping your brazos extended.
Return to the posición inicial.

instructions_en: Place a loaded barbell on the end of a bench. Standing on the bench behind the bar, take a medium, pronated grip. Stand with your hips back and chest up, maintaining a neutral spine. This will be your starting position.
Row the bar to your torso by retracting the shoulder blades and flexing the elbows. Use a controlled movement with no jerking.
After a brief pause, slowly return the bar to the starting position, ensuring to go all the way down.
instructions_es: Coloca a loaded barrara on the end of a banco. Colócate de pieing on the banco behind the barra, take a medium, pronated grip. Colócate de pie with your caderas espalda and pecho up, maintaining a neutral spine. Esta será la posición inicial.
Row the barra to your torso by retracting the hombro blades and flexing the codos. Use a controlled movimiento with no jerking.
Tras una breve pausa, slowly return the barra to the posición inicial, ensuring to go all the way down.

instructions_en: Place a loaded barbell in front of you and adopt a wide stance. Have your shins gently touching the barbell, lean forward from your hips to take an overhand, narrow grip (index fingers 6-12 inches apart). Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor, a slight bend at your knees and remember to maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, exhale as you drive through your heels to elevate the barbell. You should be pulling through your hamstrings and driving your hips forward at the same time to lift the bar up into a standing position.

After a brief pause in this standing position, lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the barbell close to you as you go. Push your glutes back to help lower the bar towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Inhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Deadlifts.

name_en: Standing Palms-Up Barbell Behind The Back Wrist Curl
instructions_en: Start by standing straight and holding a barbell behind your glutes at arm's length while using a pronated grip (palms will be facing back away from the glutes) and having your hands shoulder width apart from each other.
You should be looking straight forward while your feet are shoulder width apart from each other. This is the starting position.
While exhaling, slowly elevate the barbell up by curling your wrist in a semi-circular motion towards the ceiling.  Note: Your wrist should be the only body part moving for this exercise.
Hold the contraction for a second and lower the barbell back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When finished, lower the barbell down to the squat rack or the floor by bending the knees. Tip: It is easiest to either pick it up from a squat rack or have a partner hand it to you.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise with dumbbells using the same movements as described above.  Another option is to use one dumbbell at a time for better isolation.
name_es: De pie Palms-Up barra Behind The Back curl de muñeca
instructions_es: Start by standing straight and holding a barrara behind your glúteos at brazo's length while using a pronated grip (palms will be facing espalda away from the glúteos) and having your manos hombro width apart from each other.
You should be looking straight forward while your pies are hombro width apart from each other. This is the posición inicial.
Mientras exhaling, slowly elevate the barrara up by curling your wrist in a semi-circular motion hacia the techo.  Note: Your wrist should be the only body part moving for this exercise.
Hold the contraction for a second and lower the barrara espalda down to the posición inicial while inhaling.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
When finished, lower the barrara down to the squat rack or the suelo by bending the rodillas. Consejo: It is easiest to either pick it up from a squat rack or have a partner mano it to you.
Variaciones: You can also perform this exercise with mancuernas using the same movimientos as described above.  Another option is to use one mancuerna at a time for better isolation.

instructions_en: To begin, stand straight while holding a weight plate by the ridge at arm's length in each hand using a neutral grip (palms facing in).  You feet should be shoulder width apart from each other.  This will be your starting position.
Lower the plates until the fingers are nearly extended but can still hold weights. Inhale as you lower the plates.
Now raise the plates back to the starting position as you exhale by closing your hands.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions prescribed in your program.
Variations: You can do both hands at the same time, alternate, or do one hand at a time.
name_es: De pie Olympic Plate Hand Squeeze
instructions_es: To begin, stand straight while holding a peso plate by the ridge at brazo's length in each mano using a agarre neutro (palms facing in).  You pies should be hombro width apart from each other.  Esta será la posición inicial.
Lower the plates until the fingers are nearly extended but can still hold pesos. Inspira as you lower the plates.
Now raise the plates espalda to the posición inicial as you espira by closing your manos.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado prescribed in your program.
Variaciones: You can do both manos at the same time, alternate, or do one mano at a time.

name_en: Standing Front Barbell Raise Over Head
instructions_en: To begin, stand straight with a barbell in your hands.  You should grip the bar with palms facing down and a closer than shoulder width grip apart from each other.
Your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other.  Your elbows should be slightly bent.  This is the starting position.
Lift the barbell up until it is directly over your head while exhaling.  Make sure to keep your elbows slightly bent when performing each repetition.
Once you feel the contraction, begin to lower the barbell back down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: This exercise can also be performed with dumbbells in each hand or by using a close or wide grip with the barbell.  By alternating the widths of your grip, you will be able to contract different parts of the shoulders for an overall better physique.
name_es: De pie Front barra Raise Over Head
instructions_es: To begin, stand straight with a barrara in your manos.  You should grip the barra with palms facing down and a closer than hombro width grip apart from each other.
Your pies should be hombro width apart from each other.  Your codos should be slightly bent.  This is the posición inicial.
Lift the barrara up until it is directly over your cabeza while exhaling.  Make sure to keep your codos slightly bent when performing each repetition.
Once you feel the contraction, begin to lower the barrara espalda down to the posición inicial as you inspira.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Variaciones: This exercise can also be performed with mancuernas in each mano or by using a close or agarre amplio with the barrara.  By alternating the widths of your grip, you will be able to contract different parts of the hombros for an overall better physique.

instructions_en: Grab a barbell and adopt a shoulder width, over hand grip. Lift the bar above your head so that it is directly above your shoulders. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. Maintain a straight back throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar is below your chin.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your deltoid muscles (shoulders).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Those with back problems, may find a seated version more comfortable.
Variations: Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Smith Machine Shoulder Press.
name_es: De pie barra press de hombro
instructions_es: Coge a barrara and adopt a hombro width, over mano grip. Lift the barra above your cabeza so that it is directly above your hombros. Mantén your codos locked at this point for safety. Mantén a straight espalda throughout this movimiento. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the barra by bending at your codos until the barra is below your chin.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and press the barra espalda into the posición inicial by contracting your deltoid muscles (hombros).
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: Those with espalda problems, may find a seated version more comfortable.
Variaciones: mancuerna Shoulder Press or multipower Shoulder Press.

instructions_en: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and place the bar at shoulder height. Step underneath the bar and rotate it so that the weight is resting across the back of your shoulders. So should take hold of the bar loosely just to make sure it does not fall. Take up your stance directly below the bar with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. This is your starting position.
Exhale and contract your calf muscles elevating your heels off the floor bringing the weight onto the balls of your feet. Continue in this fashion until your calves are as tight as they can be.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Seated Calf Raises or Seated Calf Raise Machine.
instructions_es: Load the smith máquina with the desired amount of peso and place the barra at hombro height. Step underneath the barra and rotate it so that the peso is resting across the espalda of your hombros. So should take hold of the barra loosely just to make sure it does not fall. Take up your stance directly below the barra with a hombro width stance and a straight espalda. Esta es la posición inicial.
Espira and contract your calf muscles elevating your talones off the suelo bringing the peso onto the balls of your pies. Continue in this fashion until your gemelos are as tight as they can be.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Seated Calf Raises or Seated Calf Raise Machine.

instructions_en: To begin, first set the bar on a rack to just below shoulder level. Position a weight plate on the ground a couple feet back from the rack. Once the bar is loaded, step under it and place the back of your shoulders across it.
Hold on to the bar with both hands and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straighten your torso.
Step away from the rack and adopt a wide stance with the toes slightly pointed out, with one foot on the weight plate. Keep your head up at all times. This will be your starting position.
Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees and hips. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees.
Raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heels of your feet as you extend the hips and knees.
At the top of the movement, side step, bringing your feet together on the opposite side of the plate.
Using your inside foot, push the weight plate, sliding it across the floor to where you were just standing.
Place your inside foot on the weight plate, adopting a wide stance for the next repetition.
instructions_es: To begin, first set the barra on a rack to just below hombro level. Position a peso plate on the ground a couple pies espalda from the rack. Once the barra is loaded, step under it and place the espalda of your hombros across it.
Hold on to the barra with both manos and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straighten your torso.
Step away from the rack and adopt a wide stance with the toes slightly pointed out, with one pie on the peso plate. Mantén your cabeza up at all times. Esta será la posición inicial.
Empieza to slowly lower the barra by bending the rodillas and caderas. Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the gemelos becomes slightly less than 90-degrees.
Raise the barra as you espira by pushing the suelo with the talones of your pies as you extend the caderas and rodillas.
At the top of the movimiento, side step, bringing your pies together on the opposite side of the plate.
Using your inside pie, push the peso plate, sliding it across the suelo to where you were just standing.
Coloca your inside pie on the peso plate, adopting a wide stance for the next repetition.

instructions_en: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders.

At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment, the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete’s effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should move forcefully to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with your body in a full squat and the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive throught heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to floor.
instructions_es: Colócate de pieing with the peso racked on the front of the hombros, begin with the dip. With your pies directly under your caderas, flex the rodillas without moving the caderas espaldaward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the talones create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your cabeza out of the way as the barra leaves the hombros.

At this moment as the pies leave the suelo, the pies must be placed into the receiving posición as quickly as possible. In the brief moment, the pies are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete’s effort to push the barra up will drive them down. The pies should move forcefully to just outside the caderas, turned out as necessary. Receive the barra with your body in a full squat and the brazos fully extended overcabeza.
Manténing the barra aligned over the front of the talones, your cabeza and pecho up, drive throught talones of the pies to move to a standing posición. Carefully return the peso to suelo.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell on the floor. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The back angle should stay the same until the bar passes the knees.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move forcefully to a split position, one foot forward one foot back. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position, bringing your feet together.
Carefully return the weight to floor.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara on the suelo. The barra should be close to or touching the shins, and a agarre amplio should be taken on the barra. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra. This will be the posición inicial.
Empieza the first pull by driving through the front of the talones, raising the barra from the ground. The espalda angle should stay the same until the barra passes the rodillas.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the hombros and allow the codos to flex to the side.

As you move your pies into the receiving posición, forcefully pull yourself below the barra as you elevate the barra overcabeza. The pies should move forcefully to a split posición, one pie forward one pie espalda. Receive the barra with your body as low as possible and the brazos fully extended overcabeza.
Manténing the barra aligned over the front of the talones, your cabeza and pecho up, drive through talones of the pies to move to a standing posición, bringing your pies together.
Carefully return the peso to suelo.

instructions_en: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward.

Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders. At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible.

In the brief moment the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete’s effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should be moved to a split stance, one foot forward, one foot back, with the knees partially bent. Receive the bar with the arms locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position, bringing the feet together.
instructions_es: Colócate de pieing with the peso racked on the front of the hombros, begin with the dip. With your pies directly under your caderas, flex the rodillas without moving the caderas espaldaward.

Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible. Drive through the talones create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your cabeza out of the way as the barra leaves the hombros. At this moment as the pies leave the suelo, the pies must be placed into the receiving posición as quickly as possible.

In the brief moment the pies are not actively driving against the platform, the athlete’s effort to push the barra up will drive them down. The pies should be moved to a split stance, one pie forward, one pie espalda, with the rodillas partially bent. Receive the barra with the brazos locked out overcabeza.
Return to a standing posición, bringing the pies together.

instructions_en: With a barbell on the floor close to the shins, take an overhand grip just outside the legs. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back  straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight. Move the weight with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back, with the arms still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so.

Receive the bar with the feet split, aggressively moving one foot forward and one foot back. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Bring the feet together as you stand up.
instructions_es: With a barrara on the suelo close to the shins, take an overmano grip just outside the legs. Lower your caderas with the peso focused on the talones, espalda  straight, cabeza facing forward, pecho up, with your hombros just in front of the barra. Esta será la posición inicial.

Empieza the first pull by driving through the talones, extending your rodillas. Your espalda angle should stay the same, and your brazos should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the rodillas.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the clean. As the barra approaches the mid-thigh posición, begin extending through the caderas. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the caderas, rodillas, and ankles, using speed to move the barra upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the brazos to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly espalda, with the brazos still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the brazos with the codos up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your codos under the barra as you do so.

Receive the barra with the pies split, aggressively moving one pie forward and one pie espalda. The barra should be racked onto the protracted hombros, lightly touching the throat with the manos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom posición, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the talones, keeping the torso upright and codos up. Bring the pies together as you stand up.

instructions_en: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height.  Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back.  This will be your starting position.  (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up.  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor).  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front.  If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Begin to raise the bar as fast as possible without involving momentum as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position. Note: You should perform these exercises as fast as possible but without breaking perfect form and without involving momentum.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: This is not an exercise to be taken lightly due to the speed that it requires.  If you have back issues, substitute it with the dumbbell squat variation or a leg press instead.  If you have a healthy back, ensure perfect form and never slouch the back forward as this can cause back injury. Be cautious as well with the weight used; in case of doubt, use less weight rather than more.
instructions_es: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set the barra on a rack that best matches your height.  Once the correct height is chosen and the barra is loaded, step under the barra and place the espalda of your hombros (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the barra using both brazos at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and posición your legs using a hombro width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Mantén your cabeza up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight espalda.  Esta será la posición inicial.  (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the pie stances section).

Empieza to lower the barra by bending the rodillas as you maintain a straight posture with the cabeza up.  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the gemelos becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the suelo).  Inspira as you perform this portion of the movimiento. Consejo: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the rodillas should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front.  If your rodillas are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the rodilla and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.

Empieza to raise the barra as fast as possible without involving momentum as you espira by pushing the suelo with the talón of your pie mainly as you straighten the legs again and go espalda to the posición inicial. Note: You should perform these exercises as fast as possible but without breaking perfect form and without involving momentum.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: This is not an exercise to be taken lightly due to the speed that it requires.  If you have espalda issues, substitute it with the mancuerna squat variation or a leg press instead.  If you have a healthy espalda, ensure perfect form and never slouch the espalda forward as this can cause espalda injury. Be cautious as well with the peso used; in case of doubt, use less peso rather than more.

instructions_en: Begin with a wide grip, with the bar hanging at the mid thigh position. You can use a hook or overhand grip. Your back should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Shrug your shoulders towards your ears. While this exercise can usually by loaded with heavier weight than a snatch, avoid overloading to the point that the execution slows down.
instructions_es: Empieza with a agarre amplio, with the barra hanging at the mid thigh posición. You can use a hook or overmano grip. Your espalda should be straight and inclined slightly forward.
Shrug your hombros hacia your ears. Mientras this exercise can usually by loaded with heavier peso than a snatch, avoid overloading to the point that the execution slows down.

instructions_en: With a barbell on the floor close to the shins, take a wide snatch grip. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight. Move the weight with control as you continue to above the knees.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the pull. As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward.

There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back. Full extension should be violent and abrupt, and ensure that you do not prolong the extension for longer than necessary.
instructions_es: With a barrara on the suelo close to the shins, take a wide snatch grip. Lower your caderas with the peso focused on the talones, espalda straight, cabeza facing forward, pecho up, with your hombros just in front of the barra. Esta será la posición inicial.

Empieza the first pull by driving through the talones, extending your rodillas. Your espalda angle should stay the same, and your brazos should remain straight. Move the peso with control as you continue to above the rodillas.

Next comes the second pull, the main source of acceleration for the pull. As the barra approaches the mid-thigh posición, begin extending through the caderas. In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the caderas, rodillas, and ankles, using speed to move the barra upward.

There should be no need to actively pull through the brazos to accelerate the peso; at the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly espalda. Full extension should be violent and abrupt, and ensure that you do not prolong the extension for longer than necessary.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar, with the elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to the boxes.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara on cajónes or stands of the desired height. A agarre amplio should be taken on the barra. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra, with the codos pointed out. This will be the posición inicial.
Empieza the first pull by driving through the front of the talones, raising the barra from the cajónes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the hombros and allow the codos to flex to the side.

As you move your pies into the receiving posición, forcefully pull yourself below the barra as you elevate the barra overcabeza. The pies should move to just outside the caderas, turned out as necessary. Receive the barra with your body as low as possible and the brazos fully extended overcabeza.
Manténing the barra aligned over the front of the talones, your cabeza and pecho up, drive through talones of the pies to move to a standing posición. Carefully return the peso to the cajónes.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar, with the elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to the boxes.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara on cajónes or stands of the desired height. A agarre amplio should be taken on the barra. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra, with the codos pointed out. This will be the posición inicial.
Empieza the first pull by driving through the front of the talones, raising the barra from the cajónes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the hombros and allow the codos to flex to the side.

As you move your pies into the receiving posición, forcefully pull yourself below the barra as you elevate the barra overcabeza. The pies should move to just outside the caderas, turned out as necessary. Receive the barra with your body as low as possible and the brazos fully extended overcabeza.
Manténing the barra aligned over the front of the talones, your cabeza and pecho up, drive through talones of the pies to move to a standing posición. Carefully return the peso to the cajónes.

instructions_en: Begin with the feet in the pulling position, the bar racked across the back of the shoulders, and the hands placed in a wide snatch grip.
Pop the bar with an abrupt dip and drive of the knees, and aggressively drive under the bar, transitioning the feet into the receiving position.
Receive the bar locked out overhead near the bottom of the squat. The torso should remain vertical, lowering the hips between the legs.
Continue to descend to full depth, and return to a standing position. Carefully lower the weight.
instructions_es: Empieza with the pies in the pulling posición, the barra racked across the espalda of the hombros, and the manos placed in a wide snatch grip.
Pop the barra with an abrupt dip and drive of the rodillas, and aggressively drive under the barra, transitioning the pies into the receiving posición.
Receive the barra locked out overcabeza near the bottom of the squat. The torso should remain vertical, lowering the caderas between the legs.
Continue to descend to full depth, and return to a standing posición. Carefully lower the peso.

instructions_en: The snatch deadlift strengthens the first pull of the snatch. Begin with a wide snatch grip with the barbell placed on the platform. The feet should be directly under the hips, with the feet turned out. Squat down to the bar, keeping the back in absolute extension with the head facing forward.
Initiate the movement by driving through the heels, raising the hips. The back angle should remain the same until the bar passes the knees.
At that point, drive your hips through the bar as you lay back. Return the bar to the platform by reversing the motion.
instructions_es: The snatch deadlift strengthens the first pull of the snatch. Empieza with a wide snatch grip with the barrara placed on the platform. The pies should be directly under the caderas, with the pies turned out. Squat down to the barra, keeping the espalda in absolute extension with the cabeza facing forward.
Initiate the movimiento by driving through the talones, raising the caderas. The espalda angle should remain the same until the barra passes the rodillas.
At that point, drive your caderas through the barra as you lay espalda. Return the barra to the platform by reversing the motion.

instructions_en: Grab a barbell and lay flat on a bench with the bar pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated (overhand) grip with your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the barbell down towards the back of your head. Be sure to keep your elbows tucked in and stretch your triceps as you go. When you get to within an inch of the bench pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the bar along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Skull Crusher or Tricep Rope Extensions.
instructions_es: Coge a barrara and lay flat on a banco with the barra pressed straight up hacia the techo. Adopt a pronated (overmano) grip with your codos tucked in. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira as you descend the barrara down hacia the espalda of your cabeza. Be sure to keep your codos tucked in and stretch your tríceps as you go. When you get to within an inch of the banco pause for a second.
Then mientras exhaling, use your tríceps to return the barra along the same path to the posición inicial. Your brazos should be fully extended once again and pointing hacia the techo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Skull Crusher or Tricep Rope Extensions.

name_en: Palms Down Barbell Wrist Curls Over A Bench
instructions_en: Grab a barbell and kneel down next to a bench. Lean over the bench so that your forearms are supported with your wrists over hanging (barbell in hand). Adopt an overhand 'palms facing down' grip. This will be your starting position. Tip: Only your wrists should move when performing this exercise.
Exhale and curl the back of your hands up towards your forearms.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your hands along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Palms Down Wrist Curls (Dumbbell)
name_es: Palms Down barra Wrist curl Over A Bench
instructions_es: Coge a barrara and rodillal down next to a banco. Lean over the banco so that your forebrazos are supported with your wrists over hanging (barrara in mano). Adopt an overmano 'palms facing down' grip. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Only your wrists should move when performing this exercise.
Espira and curl the espalda of your manos up hacia your forebrazos.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your manos along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el movimiento el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: Palms Down Wrist Curls (mancuerna)

instructions_en: Set up a box in a power rack. The pins should be set at an appropriate height. Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders, not on top of your traps. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders.

Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back. Keep your head facing forward. With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. This will be your starting position.
Keeping the bar tight, bend forward at the hips as much as possible. If you set the pins to what would be parallel, you not only have a safety if you fail, but know when to stop.
Pause just above the pins and reverse the motion until your torso it upright.
instructions_es: Coloca up a cajón in a rack de potencia. The pins should be set at an appropriate height. Empieza by stepping under the barra and placing it across the espalda of the hombros, not on top of your traps. Squeeze your hombro blades together and rotate your codos forward, attempting to bend the barra across your hombros.

Remove the barra from the rack, creating a tight arch in your zona lumbar. Mantén your cabeza facing forward. With your espalda, hombros, and core tight, push your rodillas and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit espalda with your caderas until you are seated on the cajón. Esta será la posición inicial.
Manténing the barra tight, bend forward at the caderas as much as possible. If you set the pins to what would be parallel, you not only have a safety if you fail, but know when to stop.
Pause just above the pins and reverse the motion until your torso it upright.

instructions_en: Grab a barbell and place it on the reverse of your shoulders (just below your neck) and take a seat on a flat bench. This is your starting position.

Exhale and twist your torso clockwise through your core muscles in a controlled fashion until you cannot rotate anymore. Once you have reached this position, inhale and return your torso along the same path back to the starting position.

Exhale once more and rotate your torso anti-clockwise through your core muscles in a controlled fashion until you cannot rotate anymore. Once you have reached this position, inhale and return your torso along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: V-Sit Twist (Medicine Ball) or Decline Oblique Crunches.
instructions_es: Coge a barrara and place it on the reverse of your hombros (just below your neck) and take a seat on a flat banco. Esta es la posición inicial.

Espira and twist your torso clockwise through your core muscles in a controlled fashion until you cannot rotate anymore. Once you have reached this posición, inspira and return your torso along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.

Espira once more and rotate your torso anti-clockwise through your core muscles in a controlled fashion until you cannot rotate anymore. Once you have reached this posición, inspira and return your torso along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: V-Sit Twist (Medicine Ball) or Decline Oblique Crunches.

name_en: Stiff Legged Deadlift From A Deficit
instructions_en: Begin standing while holding a bar at arm’s length in front of you.  You can stand on a raised platform to increase the range of motion.

Begin by flexing the knees slightly, and then flex at the hip, moving your butt back as far as possible, lowering the torso as far as flexibility allows. The back should remain in absolute extension at all times, and the bar should remain in contact with the legs. If done properly, there should be heavy tension felt in the hamstrings.
Reverse the motion to return to the starting position.
name_es: Piernas rígidas peso muerto From A Deficit
instructions_es: Empieza standing while holding a barra at brazo’s length in front of you.  You can stand on a raised platform to increase the range of motion.

Empieza by flexing the rodillas slightly, and then flex at the cadera, moving your butt espalda as far as possible, lowering the torso as far as flexibility allows. The espalda should remain in absolute extension at all times, and the barra should remain in contact with the legs. If done properly, there should be heavy tension felt in the isquios.
Reverse the motion to return to the posición inicial.

instructions_en: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height.  Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place it on the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck).
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance.  Also maintain a straight back and keep the knees with a slight bend; never locked.  This will be your starting position.

Raise your heels as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the knee is kept stationary at all times.  There should be no bending (other than the slight initial bend we created during positioning) at any time.  Hold the contracted position by a second before you start to go back down.
Go back slowly to the starting position as you breathe in by lowering your heels as you bend the ankles until calves are stretched.
Now lift your toes by contracting the tibia muscles in the front of the calves as you breathe out.
Hold for a second and bring them back down as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: Maintain your back straight and stationary at all times.  Rounding of the back can cause lower back injury.  Also, choose a conservative weight.  This exercise requires a lot of balance and choosing too much weight may cause you to lose balance and fall.
Variations: A smith machine can be used for this exercise as well and it is a better choice for those with poor balance.  Dumbbells can be used also.
instructions_es: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set the barra on a rack that best matches your height.  Once the correct height is chosen and the barra is loaded, step under the barra and place it on the espalda of your hombros (slightly below the neck).
Hold on to the barra using both brazos at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and posición your legs using a hombro width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Mantén your cabeza up at all times as looking down will get you off balance.  Also maintain a straight espalda and keep the rodillas with a slight bend; never locked.  Esta será la posición inicial.

Raise your talones as you breathe out by extending your ankles as high as possible and flexing your calf. Ensure that the rodilla is kept stationary at all times.  There should be no bending (other than the slight initial bend we created during posicióning) at any time.  Hold the contracted posición by a second before you start to go espalda down.
Go espalda slowly to the posición inicial as you breathe in by lowering your talones as you bend the ankles until gemelos are stretched.
Now lift your toes by contracting the tibia muscles in the front of the gemelos as you breathe out.
Hold for a second and bring them espalda down as you breathe in.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: Mantén your espalda straight and stationary at all times.  Rounding of the espalda can cause zona lumbar injury.  Also, choose a conservative peso.  This exercise requires a lot of balance and choosing too much peso may cause you to lose balance and fall.
Variaciones: A smith máquina can be used for this exercise as well and it is a better choice for those with poor balance.  mancuernas can be used also.

instructions_en: Lie back on a flat bench.  Using a close, supinated grip (around shoulder width), lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with your arms locked extended in front of you and perpendicular to the floor.  This will be your starting position.

As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the bar on your middle chest. Tip: Make sure that as opposed to a regular bench press, you keep the elbows close to the torso at all times in order to maximize triceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the bar back to the starting position as you breathe out and push the bar using your triceps muscles.  Lock your arms in the contracted position, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.

Caution: If you are new at this exercise, it is advised that you use a spotter.  If no spotter is available, then be conservative with the amount of weight used.  Also, beware of letting the bar drift too far forward.  You want the bar to fall around the area between the sternum and upper abs.
Variation: This exercise can also be performed with an e-z bar using the inner handle as well as dumbbells.
instructions_es: Túmbate espalda on a flat banco.  Using a close, supinated grip (around hombro width), lift the barra from the rack and hold it straight over you with your brazos locked extended in front of you and perpendicular to the suelo.  Esta será la posición inicial.

As you breathe in, come down slowly until you feel the barra on your middle pecho. Consejo: Make sure that as opposed to a regular banco press, you keep the codos close to the torso at all times in order to maximize tríceps involvement.

After a second pause, bring the barra espalda to the posición inicial as you breathe out and push the barra using your tríceps muscles.  Lock your brazos in the contracted posición, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly again. Consejo: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movimiento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the barra espalda in the rack.

Precaución: If you are new at this exercise, it is advised that you use a spotter.  If no spotter is available, then be conservative with the amount of peso used.  Also, beware of letting the barra drift too far forward.  You want the barra to fall around the area between the sternum and upper abs.
Variación: This exercise can also be performed with an e-z barra using the inner asa as well as mancuernas.

instructions_en: Take hold of a pull up bar with a wide, overhand grip. Lift your feet up and off the floor so your body is now suspended. This is your starting position.
Exhale and pull your shoulder blades together, pushing your chest upward. Use your arms slightly to help aid in this process.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly lower your body back on the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrug or Smith Machine Shrug.
instructions_es: Take hold of a pull up barra with a wide, overmano grip. Lift your pies up and off the suelo so your body is now suspended. Esta es la posición inicial.
Espira and pull your hombro blades together, pushing your pecho upward. Use your brazos slightly to help aid in this process.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and slowly lower your body espalda on the same path into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: barra Shrug or multipower Shrug.

instructions_en: Grab a barbell with an overhand grip and take a seat on a preacher curl machine. Place your upper arms over the pad of the machine with your palms facing downward. Set the height of the seat so that your arm pits are snug on top of the pad and have your arms extended. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and contract your biceps to lift the barbell up towards your shoulders. Keep your triceps on the pad and squeeze your biceps until they are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly lower the barbell along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Reverse Barbell Curl or Reverse Plate Curls.
instructions_es: Coge a barrara with an overmano grip and take a seat on a preacher curl máquina. Coloca your upper brazos over the pad of the máquina with your palms facing downward. Coloca the height of the seat so that your brazo pits are snug on top of the pad and have your brazos extended. Esta será la posición inicial.
Espira and contract your bíceps to lift the barrara up hacia your hombros. Mantén your tríceps on the pad and squeeze your bíceps until they are fully contracted and the barrara is at hombro height.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and slowly lower the barrara along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Reverse barra Curl or Reverse Plate Curls.

instructions_en: Grab a barbell with a shoulder width grip (palms facing your thighs), and allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. This will be your starting position.
Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell upward toward your shoulders by flexing your biceps. Exhale as you do so and remember, only your forearms should move.
Continue in this fashion until your biceps are fully flexed and the barbell is at shoulder height.
Pause for a brief moment and then return the barbell along the same path toward the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Reverse Plate Curls or Reverse Cable Curls.
instructions_es: Coge a barrara with a hombro width grip (palms facing your thighs), and allow your brazos the hang perpendicular to the suelo. Adopt a standing posición with a hombro width stance and a straight espalda. Mantén your codos pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst keeping your upper brazos stationary, curl the barrara upward toward your hombros by flexing your bíceps. Espira as you do so and remember, only your forebrazos should move.
Continue in this fashion until your bíceps are fully flexed and the barrara is at hombro height.
Pause for a brief moment and then return the barrara along the same path toward the posición inicial as you inspira.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Reverse Plate Curls or Reverse Polea Curls.

name_en: Reverse Grip Bent Over Barbell Rows
instructions_en: Grab a barbell (underhand grip, palms facing away from you) and adopt a shoulder width stance whilst leaning forward from your hips. Maintain a straight back as you do so, making sure to flex your knees as you lean. Lean forward until your torso is nearly parallel to the floor whilst allowing your arms to hang perpendicular to it. This is your starting position.

Whilst holding a stationary torso and exhaling, pull the barbell up towards your belly button by attempting to squeeze your elbows together behind your back. In order to make this movement possible, contract the muscles in your back by pulling your shoulder blades together. At the top contracted position, pause for a second before returning the barbell along the same path to the starting position (inhale as you do so).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues.
Maintain perfect posture throughout to minimise possibility of injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Bent Over Row or Kettlebell Bent Over Row.
name_es: Agarre inverso Bent Over barra remos
instructions_es: Coge a barrara (undermano grip, palms facing away from you) and adopt a hombro width stance mientras leaning forward from your caderas. Mantén a straight espalda as you do so, making sure to flex your rodillas as you lean. Lean forward until your torso is nearly parallel to the suelo mientras allowing your brazos to hang perpendicular to it. Esta es la posición inicial.

Whilst holding a stationary torso and exhaling, pull the barrara up hacia your belly button by attempting to squeeze your codos together behind your espalda. In order to make this movimiento possible, contract the muscles in your espalda by pulling your hombro blades together. At the top contracted posición, pause for a second before returning the barrara along the same path to the posición inicial (inspira as you do so).
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución:
This exercise is not recommended for people with espalda issues.
Mantén perfect posture throughout to minimise possibility of injury.
Variaciones: mancuerna Bent Over Row or Kettlebell Bent Over Row.

instructions_en: Place a barbell on the back of your shoulders and position yourself so that one foot is flat on the floor and the other is behind you, at knee height supported by a bench (an exaggerated step's distance away). This will be your starting position.

From here, start to descend by bending at your knees (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front knee. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front knee does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movement, before exhaling and driving up through your front heel and thigh, until you return to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.
