instructions_es: Coloca a barrara on the espalda of your hombros and posición yourself so that one pie is flat on the suelo and the other is behind you, at rodilla height supported by a banco (an exaggerated step's distance away). Esta será la posición inicial.

From here, start to descend by bending at your rodillas (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front rodilla. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front rodilla does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movimiento, before exhaling and driving up through your front talón and thigh, until you return to your posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.

instructions_en: Set up in a power rack with the bar on the pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the knees, just above, or in the mid thigh position. Attach bands to the base of the rack, or secure them with dumbbells. Attach the other end to the bar. You may need to choke the bands to provide tension.

Position yourself against the bar in proper deadlifting position. Your feet should be under your hips, your grip shoulder width, back arched, and hips back to engage the hamstrings. Since the weight is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the weight.

With your head looking forward, extend through the hips and knees, pulling the weight up and back until lockout. Be sure to pull your shoulders back as you complete the movement. Return the weight to the pins and repeat.
instructions_es: Coloca up in a rack de potencia with the barra on the pins. The pins should be set to the desired point; just below the rodillas, just above, or in the mid thigh posición. Sujeta bandas to the base of the rack, or secure them with mancuernas. Sujeta the other end to the barra. You may need to choke the bandas to provide tension.

Position yourself against the barra in proper deadlifting posición. Your pies should be under your caderas, your grip hombro width, espalda arched, and caderas espalda to engage the isquios. Since the peso is typically heavy, you may use a mixed grip, a hook grip, or use straps to aid in holding the peso.

With your cabeza looking forward, extend through the caderas and rodillas, pulling the peso up and espalda until lockout. Be sure to pull your hombros espalda as you complete the movimiento. Return the peso to the pins and repeat.

instructions_en: Place a barbell on the safety bars within a squat rack. Make sure that the bars are set up at the desired height (below/above your knees or mid thigh) and adopt a deadlift position. So step up to the bar with your feet placed underneath your hips, a slight bend at your knees, hips pushed back, a slight arch in your lower back as you lean forward to grab the barbell with an overhand, shoulder width grip. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your head up, drive force through your heels and hips to lift the barbell. Exhale as you do so and use the muscles in your back to help achieve an upright standing position. Tip: Keep the bar close to your body and maintain a straight back throughout the movement. Once you are in this position, pull your shoulder blades together and push your chest out.
Next, inhale and reverse the movement, returning the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Deadlifts
instructions_es: Coloca a barrara on the safety barras within a squat rack. Make sure that the barras are set up at the desired height (below/above your rodillas or mid thigh) and adopt a deadlift posición. So step up to the barra with your pies placed underneath your caderas, a slight bend at your rodillas, caderas pushed espalda, a slight arch in your zona lumbar as you lean forward to grab the barrara with an overmano, hombro width grip. Esta será la posición inicial.

Manténing your cabeza up, drive force through your talones and caderas to lift the barrara. Espira as you do so and use the muscles in your espalda to help achieve an upright standing posición. Consejo: Mantén the barra close to your body and maintain a straight espalda throughout the movimiento. Once you are in this posición, pull your hombro blades together and push your pecho out.
Next, inspira and reverse the movimiento, returning the barrara along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: barra Deadlifts

instructions_en: Take a seat on a flat bench (no back rest) with a barbell in the rack above you. Adopt a wider than shoulder width grip and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your shoulders. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar (behind your head) by bending at your elbows your elbows are just past 90 degrees.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your deltoid muscles (shoulders).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variation: Smith Machine Shoulder Press.
name_es: Barra press de hombro (Behind The Head)
instructions_es: Take a seat on a flat banco (no espalda rest) with a barrara in the rack above you. Adopt a wider than hombro width grip and lift the barra off the rack so that it is directly above your hombros. Mantén your codos locked at this point for safety. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the barra (behind your cabeza) by bending at your codos your codos are just past 90 degrees.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and press the barra espalda into the posición inicial by contracting your deltoid muscles (hombros).
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
When you are done, place the barra espalda in the rack.
Precaución: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movimiento. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the peso you are using.
Variación: multipower Shoulder Press.

instructions_en: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders.

At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should be moved to a slightly wider stance, with the knees partially bent.
Receive the bar with the arms locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position.
instructions_es: Colócate de pieing with the peso racked on the front of the hombros, begin with the dip. With your pies directly under your caderas, flex the rodillas without moving the caderas espaldaward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the talones create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your cabeza out of the way as the barra leaves the hombros.

At this moment as the pies leave the suelo, the pies must be placed into the receiving posición as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the pies are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the barra up will drive them down. The pies should be moved to a slightly wider stance, with the rodillas partially bent.
Receive the barra with the brazos locked out overcabeza.
Return to a standing posición.

instructions_en: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Have your knees bent to create a 90 degree angle with your feet planted on the floor. Take hold of a barbell and keep it close to your chest. Tip: For this movement you may either need a partner to hold your feet down or gently place additional weights on your feet. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and roll your shoulders up and off the mat by contracting your abdominal muscles whilst pressing the barbell directly towards the ceiling at the same time. Continue to sit up as you push the weight as high towards the ceiling as possible.
Once your arms are vertical and your abdominal muscles are as tight as they can be, pause briefly, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Otis-Up or Crunches.
instructions_es: Coge a mat and lay down flat on your espalda. Have your rodillas bent to create a 90 degree angle with your pies planted on the suelo. Take hold of a barrara and keep it close to your pecho. Consejo: For this movimiento you may either need a partner to hold your pies down or gently place additional pesos on your pies. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and roll your hombros up and off the mat by contracting your abdominal muscles mientras pressing the barrara directly hacia the techo at the same time. Continue to sit up as you push the peso as high hacia the techo as possible.
Once your brazos are vertical and your abdominal muscles are as tight as they can be, pause briefly, inspira and return your body espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Otis-Up or Crunches.

name_en: Narrow Grip EZ Bar Preacher Curls
instructions_en: Grab an EZ Curl bar, loaded up with the precribed amount of weight and take a seat on a preacher curl machine. Place your upper arms over the pad of the machine with your palms facing your shoulders. Start with your biceps fully contracted and the bar close to your shoulders. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the bar until your upper arms are extended and your biceps are fully stretched.
Exhale and contract your biceps to lift the bar back up to the starting position.
Squeeze your biceps for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Curls or Dumbbell Preacher Curls.
name_es: Agarre cerrado barra EZ Preacher curl
instructions_es: Coge an EZ Curl barra, loaded up with the precribed amount of peso and take a seat on a preacher curl máquina. Coloca your upper brazos over the pad of the máquina with your palms facing your hombros. Start with your bíceps fully contracted and the barra close to your hombros. Esta será la posición inicial.
As you inspira, slowly lower the barra until your upper brazos are extended and your bíceps are fully stretched.
Espira and contract your bíceps to lift the barra espalda up to the posición inicial.
Squeeze your bíceps for a second at the contracted posición and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variaciones: Polea Curls or mancuerna Preacher Curls.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar, with the elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar above a full squat and with the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to the boxes.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara on cajónes or stands of the desired height. A agarre amplio should be taken on the barra. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra, with the codos pointed out. This will be the posición inicial.
Empieza the first pull by driving through the front of the talones, raising the barra from the cajónes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the hombros and allow the codos to flex to the side.

As you move your pies into the receiving posición, forcefully pull yourself below the barra as you elevate the barra overcabeza. The pies should move to just outside the caderas, turned out as necessary. Receive the barra above a full squat and with the brazos fully extended overcabeza.
Manténing the barra aligned over the front of the talones, your cabeza and pecho up, drive through talones of the pies to move to a standing posición. Carefully return the peso to the cajónes.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell on boxes or stands of the desired height. A wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar, with the elbows pointed out. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the boxes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The feet should move to just outside the hips, turned out as necessary. Receive the bar above a full squat and with the arms fully extended overhead.
Keeping the bar aligned over the front of the heels, your head and chest up, drive through heels of the feet to move to a standing position. Carefully return the weight to the boxes.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara on cajónes or stands of the desired height. A agarre amplio should be taken on the barra. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra, with the codos pointed out. This will be the posición inicial.
Empieza the first pull by driving through the front of the talones, raising the barra from the cajónes.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the hombros and allow the codos to flex to the side.

As you move your pies into the receiving posición, forcefully pull yourself below the barra as you elevate the barra overcabeza. The pies should move to just outside the caderas, turned out as necessary. Receive the barra above a full squat and with the brazos fully extended overcabeza.
Manténing the barra aligned over the front of the talones, your cabeza and pecho up, drive through talones of the pies to move to a standing posición. Carefully return the peso to the cajónes.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell held at the mid thigh position with a wide grip. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.

Begin the pull by driving through the heels, raising the bar. Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body.
Continue raising the bar to the overhead position, as your arms are fully extended above your head gently bend at the knees to absorb some of the pressure through your lower body.
Return the bar to the floor in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara held at the mid thigh posición with a agarre amplio. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra. This will be the posición inicial.

Empieza the pull by driving through the talones, raising the barra. Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body.
Continue raising the barra to the overcabeza posición, as your brazos are fully extended above your cabeza gently bend at the rodillas to absorb some of the pressure through your lower body.
Return the barra to the suelo in a controlled manner.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

instructions_en: Standing with the weight racked on the front of the shoulders, begin with the dip. With your feet directly under your hips, flex the knees without moving the hips backward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the heels create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your head out of the way as the bar leaves the shoulders.

At this moment as the feet leave the floor, the feet must be placed into the receiving position as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the feet are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the bar up will drive them down. The feet should be moved to a slightly wider stance, with the knees partially bent.
Receive the bar with the arms locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position.
instructions_es: Colócate de pieing with the peso racked on the front of the hombros, begin with the dip. With your pies directly under your caderas, flex the rodillas without moving the caderas espaldaward. Go down only slightly, and reverse direction as powerfully as possible.
Drive through the talones create as much speed and force as possible, and be sure to move your cabeza out of the way as the barra leaves the hombros.

At this moment as the pies leave the suelo, the pies must be placed into the receiving posición as quickly as possible. In the brief moment the pies are not actively driving against the platform, the athletes effort to push the barra up will drive them down. The pies should be moved to a slightly wider stance, with the rodillas partially bent.
Receive the barra with the brazos locked out overcabeza.
Return to a standing posición.

instructions_en: With a barbell on boxes of the desired height, take a grip just outside the legs. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back  straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight.  As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips.

In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight. At the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back, with the arms still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out. At peak extension, pull yourself under the bar far enough that it can be racked onto the shoulders, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed.

Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position, and complete the repetition by returning the weight to the boxes.
instructions_es: With a barrara on cajónes of the desired height, take a grip just outside the legs. Lower your caderas with the peso focused on the talones, espalda  straight, cabeza facing forward, pecho up, with your hombros just in front of the barra. Esta será la posición inicial.

Empieza the first pull by driving through the talones, extending your rodillas. Your espalda angle should stay the same, and your brazos should remain straight.  As the barra approaches the mid-thigh posición, begin extending through the caderas.

In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the caderas, rodillas, and ankles, using speed to move the barra upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the brazos to accelerate the peso. At the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly espalda, with the brazos still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the brazos with the codos up and out. At peak extension, pull yourself under the barra far enough that it can be racked onto the hombros, rotating your codos under the barra as you do so. The barra should be racked onto the protracted hombros, lightly touching the throat with the manos relaxed.

Immediately recover by driving through the talones, keeping the torso upright and codos up. Continue until you have risen to a standing posición, and complete the repetition by returning the peso to the cajónes.

instructions_en: With a barbell on boxes of the desired height, take a grip just outside the legs. Lower your hips with the weight focused on the heels, back straight, head facing forward, chest up, with your shoulders just in front of the bar. This will be your starting position.

Begin the first pull by driving through the heels, extending your knees. Your back angle should stay the same, and your arms should remain straight.  As the bar approaches the mid-thigh position, begin extending through the hips.

In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the hips, knees, and ankles, using speed to move the bar upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the arms to accelerate the weight. At the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly back, with the arms still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out. At peak extension, pull yourself under the bar far enough that it can be racked onto the shoulders, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed.

Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position, and complete the repetition by returning the weight to the boxes.
instructions_es: With a barrara on cajónes of the desired height, take a grip just outside the legs. Lower your caderas with the peso focused on the talones, espalda straight, cabeza facing forward, pecho up, with your hombros just in front of the barra. Esta será la posición inicial.

Empieza the first pull by driving through the talones, extending your rodillas. Your espalda angle should stay the same, and your brazos should remain straight.  As the barra approaches the mid-thigh posición, begin extending through the caderas.

In a jumping motion, accelerate by extending the caderas, rodillas, and ankles, using speed to move the barra upward. There should be no need to actively pull through the brazos to accelerate the peso. At the end of the second pull, the body should be fully extended, leaning slightly espalda, with the brazos still extended.

As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the brazos with the codos up and out. At peak extension, pull yourself under the barra far enough that it can be racked onto the hombros, rotating your codos under the barra as you do so. The barra should be racked onto the protracted hombros, lightly touching the throat with the manos relaxed.

Immediately recover by driving through the talones, keeping the torso upright and codos up. Continue until you have risen to a standing posición, and complete the repetition by returning the peso to the cajónes.

instructions_en: Note: This exercise is extremely complex and requires the execution of many phases.
Phase 1: Starting Position
Stand with your feet slightly wider than shoulder width apart and toes pointing out slightly.
Squat down and grasp the bar with a closed, pronated grip. Your hands should be slightly wider than shoulder width apart outside knees with elbows fully extended.
Place the bar about 1 inch in front of your shins and over the balls of your feet.
Your back should be flat or slightly arched, your chest held up and out and your shoulder blades should be retracted.
Keep your head in a neutral position (in line with vertebral column and not tilted or rotated) with your eyes focused straight ahead. Inhale during this phase.
Phase 2: First Pull Phase

Lift the bar from the floor by forcefully extending the hips and the knees as you exhale.  Tip: The upper torso should maintain the same angle.  Do not bend at the waist yet and do not let the hips rise before the shoulders (this would have the effect of pushing the glutes in the air and stretching the hamstrings.
Keep elbows fully extended with the head in a neutral position and the shoulders over the bar.
As the bar raises keep it as close to the shins as possible.
Phase 3: Transition or Scoop Phase
As the bar passes the knees, thrust your hips forward and slightly bend the knees to avoid locking them. Tip: At this point your thighs should be against the bar.
Keep the back flat or slightly arched, elbows fully extended and your head neutral. Tip: You will hold your breath until the next phase.
Phase 4: Second Pull Phase
Inhale and then forcefully and quickly extend your hips and knees and stand on your toes.

Keep the bar as close to your body as possible.  Tip: Your back should be flat with the elbows pointed out to the sides and your head in a neutral position.  Also, keep your shoulders over the bar and arms straight as long as possible.
When your lower body joints are fully extended, shrug the shoulders upward rapidly without letting the elbows flex yet. Exhale during this portion of the movement.
As the shoulders reach their highest elevation flex your elbows to begin pulling your body under the bar.

Continue to pull the arms as high and as long as possible. Tip: Due to the explosive nature of this phase, your torso will be erect or with an arched back, your head will be tilted back slightly and your feet may lose contact with the floor.
Phase 5: Catch Phase
After the lower body has fully extended and the bar reaches near maximal height, pull your body under the bar and rotate the arms around and under the bar.
Simultaneously, flex the hips and knees into a quarter squat position.
Once the arms are under the bar, inhale and then lift your elbows to position the upper arms parallel to the floor. Rack the bar across the front of your collar bones and front shoulder muscles.
Catch the bar with an erect and tight torso, a neutral head position and flat feet. Exhale during this movement.
Stand up by extending the hips and knees to a fully erect position.
Phase 6: Downward Movement Phase
Lower the bar by gradually reducing the muscular tension of the arms to allow a controlled descent of the bar to the thighs. Inhale during this movement.
Simultaneously flex the hips and knees to cushion the impact of the bar on the thighs.
Squat down with the elbows fully extended until the bar touches the floor.
Start over at Phase 1 and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions_es: Note: This exercise is extremely complex and requires the execution of many phases.
Phase 1: Starting Position
Colócate de pie with your pies slightly wider than hombro width apart and toes pointing out slightly.
Squat down and grasp the barra with a closed, pronated grip. Your manos should be slightly wider than hombro width apart outside rodillas with codos fully extended.
Coloca the barra about 1 inch in front of your shins and over the balls of your pies.
Your espalda should be flat or slightly arched, your pecho held up and out and your hombro blades should be retracted.
Mantén your cabeza in a neutral posición (in line with vertebral column and not tilted or rotated) with your eyes focused straight acabeza. Inspira during this phase.
Phase 2: First Pull Phase

Lift the barra from the suelo by forcefully extending the caderas and the rodillas as you espira.  Consejo: The upper torso should maintain the same angle.  Do not bend at the waist yet and do not let the caderas rise before the hombros (this would have the effect of pushing the glúteos in the air and stretching the isquios.
Mantén codos fully extended with the cabeza in a neutral posición and the hombros over the barra.
As the barra raises keep it as close to the shins as possible.
Phase 3: Transition or Scoop Phase
As the barra passes the rodillas, thrust your caderas forward and slightly bend the rodillas to avoid locking them. Consejo: At this point your thighs should be against the barra.
Mantén the espalda flat or slightly arched, codos fully extended and your cabeza neutral. Consejo: You will hold your breath until the next phase.
Phase 4: Second Pull Phase
Inspira and then forcefully and quickly extend your caderas and rodillas and stand on your toes.

Mantén the barra as close to your body as possible.  Consejo: Your espalda should be flat with the codos pointed out to the sides and your cabeza in a neutral posición.  Also, keep your hombros over the barra and brazos straight as long as possible.
When your lower body joints are fully extended, shrug the hombros upward rapidly without letting the codos flex yet. Espira during this portion of the movimiento.
As the hombros reach their highest elevation flex your codos to begin pulling your body under the barra.

Continue to pull the brazos as high and as long as possible. Consejo: Due to the explosive nature of this phase, your torso will be erect or with an arched espalda, your cabeza will be tilted espalda slightly and your pies may lose contact with the suelo.
Phase 5: Catch Phase
After the lower body has fully extended and the barra reaches near maximal height, pull your body under the barra and rotate the brazos around and under the barra.
Simultaneously, flex the caderas and rodillas into a quarter squat posición.

Once the brazos are under the barra, inspira and then lift your codos to posición the upper brazos parallel to the suelo. Rack the barra across the front of your collar bones and front hombro muscles.
Catch the barra with an erect and tight torso, a neutral cabeza posición and flat pies. Espira during this movimiento.
Colócate de pie up by extending the caderas and rodillas to a fully erect posición.
Phase 6: Downward Movement Phase
Lower the barra by gradually reducing the muscular tension of the brazos to allow a controlled descent of the barra to the thighs. Inspira during this movimiento.
Simultaneously flex the caderas and rodillas to cushion the impact of the barra on the thighs.
Squat down with the codos fully extended until the barra touches the suelo.
Start over at Phase 1 and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

instructions_en: Pin presses remove the eccentric phase of the bench press, developing starting strength. They also allow you to train a desired range of motion.

The bench should be set up in a power rack. Set the pins to the desired point in your range of motion, whether it just be lockout or an inch off of your chest. The bar should be moved to the pins and prepared for lifting.

Begin by lying on the bench, with the bar directly above the contact point during your regular bench.  Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.
You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus on the triceps.  The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.
Return the bar to the pins, pausing before beginning the next repetition.
instructions_es: Pin presses remove the eccentric phase of the banco press, developing starting strength. They also allow you to train a desired range of motion.

The banco should be set up in a rack de potencia. Coloca the pins to the desired point in your range of motion, whether it just be lockout or an inch off of your pecho. The barra should be moved to the pins and prepared for lifting.

Empieza by lying on the banco, with the barra directly above the contact point during your regular banco.  Tuck your pies underneath you and arch your espalda. Using the barra to help support your peso, lift your hombro off the banco and retract them, squeezing the hombro blades together. Use your pies to drive your traps into the banco. Mantén this tight body posición throughout the movimiento.
You can take a standard banco grip, or hombro width to focus on the tríceps.  The barra, wrist, and codo should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the barra and trying to pull it apart.
Drive the barra up with as much force as possible. The codos should be tucked in until lockout.
Return the barra to the pins, pausing before beginning the next repetition.

instructions_en: Set the pins of a squat rack at shoulder height. Place your barbell on those pins and load up with the required weight. Now take a wider than shoulder width grip and lift the bar off the rack keeping it close to your body. Next, press the bar above your head and fully extend your arms. Lock out your elbows and take a small step backwards. Adopt a shoulders width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and arms perpendicular to the ground..
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Kettlebell Squats.
name_es: Barra por encima de la cabeza squats
instructions_es: Coloca the pins of a squat rack at hombro height. Coloca your barrara on those pins and load up with the required peso. Now take a wider than hombro width grip and lift the barra off the rack keeping it close to your body. Next, press the barra above your cabeza and fully extend your brazos. Lock out your codos and take a small step espaldawards. Adopt a hombros width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Mantén a straight espalda throughout this movimiento. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and begin to descend by bending at your rodillas and caderas. Your peso should be put predominantly through your talones as you sit espalda into the movimiento until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the suelo.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barra to the posición inicial along the same path, push through your talones with the force being driven through your cuádriceps and glúteos to do so. Colócate de pie to attention with your legs fully extended, espalda straight and brazos perpendicular to the ground..
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: This is a very complex movimiento and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your pesos. If you suffer from espalda issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variaciones: mancuerna Squats or Kettlebell Squats.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell held at the mid thigh position with a wide grip. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.

Begin the pull by driving through the heels, raising the bar. Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body.
Continue raising the bar to the overhead position.

As the bar reaches the overhead position, squat underneath it to absorb some of the pressure through your lower body. Once stable, extend your body into an upright position before returning the bar to the floor in a controlled manner.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara held at the mid thigh posición with a agarre amplio. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra. This will be the posición inicial.

Empieza the pull by driving through the talones, raising the barra. Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body.
Continue raising the barra to the overcabeza posición.

As the barra reaches the overcabeza posición, squat underneath it to absorb some of the pressure through your lower body. Once stable, extend your body into an upright posición before returning the barra to the suelo in a controlled manner.

instructions_en: Lie face forward on a tall flat bench while holding a barbell with a supinated grip (palms facing up). Tip: If you are holding a barbell grab it using a shoulder-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner handles.  Your upper body should be positioned in a way that the upper chest is over the end of the bench and the barbell is hanging in front of you with the arms extended and perpendicular to the floor.  This will be your starting position.
While keeping the elbows in and the upper arms stationary, curl the weight up in a semi-circular motion as you contract the biceps and exhale.  Hold at the top of the movement for a second.

As you inhale, slowly go back to the starting position.  Tip: Maintain full control of the weight at all times and avoid any swinging.  Remember, only the forearms should move throughout the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: If no tall bench is available you can opt for an adjustable bench and you can place it at an incline that allows you to have your arms fully extended without the bar touching the floor.
You can also perform the exercise using dumbbells.
instructions_es: Túmbate face forward on a tall flat banco while holding a barrara with a supinated grip (palms facing up). Consejo: If you are holding a barrara grab it using a hombro-width grip and if you are using an E-Z Bar grab it on the inner asas.  Your upper body should be posicióned in a way that the upper pecho is over the end of the banco and the barrara is hanging in front of you with the brazos extended and perpendicular to the suelo.  Esta será la posición inicial.
Mientras keeping the codos in and the upper brazos stationary, curl the peso up in a semi-circular motion as you contract the bíceps and espira.  Hold at the top of the movimiento for a second.

As you inspira, slowly go espalda to the posición inicial.  Consejo: Mantén full control of the peso at all times and avoid any swinging.  Remember, only the forebrazos should move throughout the movimiento.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Variaciones: If no tall banco is available you can opt for an adjustable banco and you can place it at an incline that allows you to have your brazos fully extended without the barra touching the suelo.
You can also perform the exercise using mancuernas.

name_en: Narrow Grip Barbell Tricep Press To Chin
instructions_en: Lay flat on a bench with a barbell in hand. Take a narrow grip (where if your thumbs were extended, would touch) and press the bar directly above your chin so your arms are at full extension. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by allowing your elbows to flare out wide until the bar is about 1 inch away from your chin.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your triceps.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variations: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Incline Dumbbell Kickbacks.
name_es: Agarre cerrado barra tríceps Press To Chin
instructions_es: Túmbate flat on a banco with a barrara in mano. Take a agarre cerrado (where if your thumbs were extended, would touch) and press the barra directly above your chin so your brazos are at full extension. Mantén your codos locked at this point for safety. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the barra by allowing your codos to flare out wide until the barra is about 1 inch away from your chin.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and press the barra espalda into the posición inicial by contracting your tríceps.
Repeat the movimiento for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Precaución: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movimiento. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the peso you are using.
Variaciones: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Incline mancuerna Kickespaldas.

instructions_en: Place a cambered bar underneath an exercise bench.
Lie face down on the exercise bench and grab the bar using a palms down (pronated grip) that is wider than shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale row the bar up as you keep the elbows close to your body to either your chest, in order to target the upper mid back, or to your stomach if targeting the lats is your goal.
After a second hold at the top, lower back down to the starting position slowly as you inhale.

Variations: A regular barbell can be used, but a cambered barbell gives you a greater range of motion. You can also turn this into a rear delt movement by flaring the elbows out instead of keeping them close to your torso.
instructions_es: Coloca a cambered barra underneath an exercise banco.
Túmbate boca abajo on the exercise banco and grab the barra using a palms down (pronated grip) that is wider than hombro width. Esta será la posición inicial.
As you espira row the barra up as you keep the codos close to your body to either your pecho, in order to target the upper mid espalda, or to your stomach if targeting the dorsales is your goal.
After a second hold at the top, zona lumbar down to the posición inicial slowly as you inspira.

Variaciones: A regular barrara can be used, but a cambered barrara gives you a greater range of motion. You can also turn this into a rear delt movimiento by flaring the codos out instead of keeping them close to your torso.

instructions_en: Position a bar into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the bar to an appropriate weight.
Raise the bar from the floor, taking it to shoulder height with both hands with your arms extended in front of you. Adopt a wide stance. This will be your starting position.
Perform the movement by rotating the trunk and hips as you swing the weight all the way down to one side. Keep your arms extended throughout the exercise.
Reverse the motion to swing the weight all the way to the opposite side.
Continue alternating the movement until the set is complete.
instructions_es: Position a barra into a landmine or securely anchor it in a corner. Load the barra to an appropriate peso.
Raise the barra from the suelo, taking it to hombro height with both manos with your brazos extended in front of you. Adopt a wide stance. Esta será la posición inicial.
Perform the movimiento by rotating the trunk and caderas as you swing the peso all the way down to one side. Mantén your brazos extended throughout the exercise.
Reverse the motion to swing the peso all the way to the opposite side.
Continue alternating the movimiento until the set is complete.

instructions_en: Lay flat on a bench with a barbell in the rack above you. Take a close grip (6-12 inches between your index fingers) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches the middle of your chest. Your elbows should remain close together and should brush along the sides of your torso as you go.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into the starting position by contracting your triceps and pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variation: Smith Machine Close Grip Bench Press.
instructions_es: Túmbate flat on a banco with a barrara in the rack above you. Take a close grip (6-12 inches between your index fingers) and lift the barra off the rack so that it is directly above your pecho. Mantén your codos locked at this point for safety. Esta será la posición inicial.

Whilst inhaling, start to lower the barra by bending at your codos until the barra gently touches the middle of your pecho. Your codos should remain close together and should brush along the sides of your torso as you go.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and press the barra espalda along the same path into the posición inicial by contracting your tríceps and pectoral muscles.
Repite el movimiento el número de repeticiones recomendado.
When you are done, place the barra espalda in the rack.
Precaución: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movimiento. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the peso you are using.
Variación: multipower Close Grip Bench Press.

instructions_en: This movement strengthens the dip portion of the jerk. Begin with the bar racked in the jerk position, with the shoulders forward to create a shelf and the bar lightly contacting the throat. The feet should be directly under the hips, with the feet turned out as is comfortable.

Keeping the torso vertical, dip by flexing the knees, allowing them to travel forward and without moving the hips to the rear. The dip should not be excessive. Return the weight to the starting position by driving forcefully though the feet.
instructions_es: This movimiento strengthens the dip portion of the jerk. Empieza with the barra racked in the jerk posición, with the hombros forward to create a shelf and the barra lightly contacting the throat. The pies should be directly under the caderas, with the pies turned out as is comfortable.

Manténing the torso vertical, dip by flexing the rodillas, allowing them to travel forward and without moving the caderas to the rear. The dip should not be excessive. Return the peso to the posición inicial by driving forcefully though the pies.

instructions_en: This drill helps you learn to drive yourself low enough during the jerk and corrects those who move backward during the movement. Begin with the bar racked in the jerk position, with the shoulders forward, torso upright, and the feet split slightly apart.
Initiate the movement as you would a normal jerk, dipping at the knees while keeping your torso vertical, and driving back up forcefully, using momentum and not your arms to elevate the weight.
Keep the rear foot in place, using it to drive your body forward into a full split as you jerk the weight. Recover by standing up with the weight overhead.
instructions_es: This drill helps you learn to drive yourself low enough during the jerk and corrects those who move espaldaward during the movimiento. Empieza with the barra racked in the jerk posición, with the hombros forward, torso upright, and the pies split slightly apart.

Initiate the movimiento as you would a normal jerk, dipping at the rodillas while keeping your torso vertical, and driving espalda up forcefully, using momentum and not your brazos to elevate the peso.
Mantén the rear pie in place, using it to drive your body forward into a full split as you jerk the peso. Recover by standing up with the peso overcabeza.

instructions_en: Place a barbell on the floor.
Stand in the middle of the bar length wise.
Bend down by bending at the knees and keeping your back straight and grasp the front of the bar with your right hand.  Your palm should be in (neutral grip) facing the left side.

Grasp the rear of the bar with your left hand.  The palm of your hand should be in neutral grip alignment (palms facing the right side).  Tip: Ensure that your grip is even on the bar.  Your torso should be positioned right in the middle of the bar and the distance between your torso and your right hand (which should be at the front) should be the same as the distance between your torso and your left hand (which should be to your back).
Now stand straight up with the weight.  Tip: Your feet should be shoulder width apart and your toes slightly pointed out.

Squat down by bending at the knees and keeping your back straight until your upper thighs are parallel with the floor. Tip: Keep your back as vertical as possible with the floor and your head up. Also remember to not let your knees go past your toes.  Inhale during this portion of the movement.

Now drive yourself back up to the starting position by pushing with the feet . Tip: Keep the bar hanging at arm's length and your elbows locked with a slight bend. The arms only serve as hooks.  Avoid doing any lifting with them.  Do the lifting with your thighs; not your arms.

Variations: You can also perform the exercise using wrist wraps.  In addition, you can use many of the other squat variations.  Finally, you can also perform the exercise with a wide stance or a closer stance.
instructions_es: Coloca a barrara on the suelo.
Colócate de pie in the middle of the barra length wise.
Bend down by bending at the rodillas and keeping your espalda straight and grasp the front of the barra with your right mano.  Your palm should be in (agarre neutro) facing the left side.

Grasp the rear of the barra with your left mano.  The palm of your mano should be in agarre neutro alignment (palms facing the right side).  Consejo: Ensure that your grip is even on the barra.  Your torso should be posicióned right in the middle of the barra and the distance between your torso and your right mano (which should be at the front) should be the same as the distance between your torso and your left mano (which should be to your espalda).
Now stand straight up with the peso.  Consejo: Your pies should be hombro width apart and your toes slightly pointed out.

Squat down by bending at the rodillas and keeping your espalda straight until your upper thighs are parallel with the suelo. Consejo: Mantén your espalda as vertical as possible with the suelo and your cabeza up. Also remember to not let your rodillas go past your toes.  Inspira during this portion of the movimiento.

Now drive yourself espalda up to the posición inicial by pushing with the pies . Consejo: Mantén the barra hanging at brazo's length and your codos locked with a slight bend. The brazos only serve as hooks.  Avoid doing any lifting with them.  Do the lifting with your thighs; not your brazos.

Variaciones: You can also perform the exercise using wrist wraps.  In addition, you can use many of the other squat variations.  Finally, you can also perform the exercise with a wide stance or a closer stance.

instructions_en: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and lie back on an incline bench.
The dumbbells should be at arm's length hanging at your sides and your palms should be facing out.  This will be your starting position.

Now as you exhale curl the weight outward and up while keeping your forearms in line with your side deltoids. Continue the curl until the dumbbells are at shoulder height and to the sides of your deltoids. Tip: The end of the movement should look similar to a double biceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, start to inhale and slowly lower the weights back to the starting position using the same path used to bring them up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise with cables or exercise bands.
instructions_es: Hold a mancuerna in each mano and lie espalda on an incline banco.
The mancuernas should be at brazo's length hanging at your sides and your palms should be facing out.  Esta será la posición inicial.

Now as you espira curl the peso outward and up while keeping your forebrazos in line with your side deltoids. Continue the curl until the mancuernas are at hombro height and to the sides of your deltoids. Consejo: The end of the movimiento should look similar to a double bíceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movimiento, start to inspira and slowly lower the pesos espalda to the posición inicial using the same path used to bring them up.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: You can also perform this exercise with poleas or exercise bandas.

instructions_en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lie face down on an incline bench that is set to an incline that is approximately 30 degrees.
Let the arms hang to your sides fully extended as they point to the floor.
Turn the wrists until your hands have a pronated (palms down) grip.
Now flare the elbows out.  This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, start to pull the dumbbells up as if you are doing a reverse bench press. You will do this by bending at the elbows and bringing the upper arms up as you let the forearms hang.  Continue this motion until the upper arms are at the same level as your back.  Tip: The elbows will come out to the side and your upper arms and torso should make the letter "T" at the top of the movement.  Hold the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly go back down to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can perform this same movement but with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).  You can also use a barbell.
instructions_es: Coge a mancuerna in each mano and lie boca abajo on an incline banco that is set to an incline that is approximately 30 degrees.
Let the brazos hang to your sides fully extended as they point to the suelo.
Turn the wrists until your manos have a pronated (palms down) grip.
Now flare the codos out.  Esta será la posición inicial.

As you breathe out, start to pull the mancuernas up as if you are doing a reverse banco press. You will do this by bending at the codos and bringing the upper brazos up as you let the forebrazos hang.  Continue this motion until the upper brazos are at the same level as your espalda.  Consejo: The codos will come out to the side and your upper brazos and torso should make the letter "T" at the top of the movimiento.  Hold the contraction at the top for a second.
Slowly go espalda down to the posición inicial as you breathe in.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: You can perform this same movimiento but with a agarre neutro (palms facing each other).  You can also use a barrara.

instructions_en: Lay on an incline bench (between 30-45%) with a barbell in the rack above you. Take a medium grip (a grip which creates a 90 degree angle at your elbows half way through the movement) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches the top of your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variations: Smith Machine Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.
instructions_es: Túmbate on an incline banco (between 30-45%) with a barrara in the rack above you. Take a medium grip (a grip which creates a 90 degree angle at your codos half way through the movimiento) and lift the barra off the rack so that it is directly above your pecho. Mantén your codos locked at this point for safety. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the barra by bending at your codos until the barra gently touches the top of your pecho.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and press the barra espalda into the posición inicial by contracting your pectoral muscles.
Repite el movimiento el número de repeticiones recomendado.
When you are done, place the barra espalda in the rack.
Precaución: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movimiento. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the peso you are using.
Variaciones: multipower Incline Bench Press or Incline mancuerna Chest Press.

name_en: Incline Narrow Grip EZ Bar Skullcrushers
instructions_en: Grab a barbell (overhand grip) and lay on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) with the bar pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Keep your elbows as close together as you can to initiate maximum tricep activity. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the barbell towards the top of your bench/head. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your head pause for a brief moment.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the bar to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Kickbacks or Tricep Rope Extenions.
name_es: Inclinado agarre cerrado barra EZ Skullcrushers
instructions_es: Coge a barrara (overmano grip) and lay on an incline banco (around 30-45 degrees) with the barra pressed straight up hacia the techo. Mantén your codos as close together as you can to initiate maximum tricep activity. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira as you descend the barrara hacia the top of your banco/cabeza. Be sure to keep your upper brazos stationary and your codos tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your cabeza pause for a brief moment.
Then mientras exhaling, use your tríceps to return the barra to the posición inicial. Your brazos should be fully extended once again and pointing hacia the techo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Tricep Kickespaldas or Tricep Rope Extenions.

instructions_en: Set a barbell in a rack at waist height or if you'd prefer, set the smith machine bar at the same height.

Lay yourself down underneath the bar and adopt an underhand, wider than shoulder width grip. Your heels should be the only body part in contact with the floor at this point as your body should be in a suspended, straight, rigid position above the ground. Your arms should be perpendicular to the floor as your torso hangs from them. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow, pulling your chest towards the bar through the muscles in your back. Retract your shoulder blades and exhale as you perform the movement.
Once your chest is an inch away from the bar, pause for a brief moment.
As you inhale, return yourself along the same path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Underhand Lat Pulldowns or Seated Cable Row
instructions_es: Coloca a barrara in a rack at waist height or if you'd prefer, set the smith máquina barra at the same height.

Túmbate yourself down underneath the barra and adopt an undermano, wider than hombro width grip. Your talones should be the only body part in contact with the suelo at this point as your body should be in a suspended, straight, rigid posición above the ground. Your brazos should be perpendicular to the suelo as your torso hangs from them. Esta será la posición inicial.
Empieza by flexing the codo, pulling your pecho hacia the barra through the muscles in your espalda. Retract your hombro blades and espira as you perform the movimiento.
Once your pecho is an inch away from the barra, pause for a brief moment.
As you inspira, return yourself along the same path hacia the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Undermano Lat Pulldowns or Seated Polea Row

instructions_en: Load up a trap bar (also known as a hex bar) and stand inside it with a shoulder width stance.

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back), bend at your knees and hips (until your hips are just above knee height) which will lower your torso enabling you to take hold of the handles. This will be the starting position of the exercise.

Initiate the movement by pressing through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously use the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. Maintain strict form (straight back) and exhale. Once you are in a standing position you should push your chest out by pulling your shoulder blades together.
After a brief pause, descend the frame back along the same path and inhale until you are back in the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any back pain, this may not be suitable movement for you.
Variation: Rack Pulls or Barbell Deadlifts.
name_es: Hex Bar peso muerto From Frame
instructions_es: Load up a trap barra (also known as a hex barra) and stand inside it with a hombro width stance.

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight espalda), bend at your rodillas and caderas (until your caderas are just above rodilla height) which will lower your torso enabling you to take hold of the asas. This will be the posición inicial of the exercise.

Initiate the movimiento by pressing through your talones and cuádriceps mientras simultaneously use the muscles in your espalda to bring your torso into a vertical posición. Mantén strict form (straight espalda) and espira. Once you are in a standing posición you should push your pecho out by pulling your hombro blades together.
Tras una breve pausa, descend the frame espalda along the same path and inspira until you are espalda in the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any espalda pain, this may not be suitable movimiento for you.
Variación: Rack Pulls or barra Deadlifts.

instructions_en: This drill helps you learn the snatch. Begin by holding a light weight across the back of the shoulders. Your feet should be slightly wider than hip width apart with the feet turned out, the same position that you would perform a squat with.
Begin by dipping with the knees slightly, and popping back up to briefly unload the bar. Drive yourself underneath the bar, elevating it overhead as you descend into a full squat.
Return to a standing position.
instructions_es: This drill helps you learn the snatch. Empieza by holding a light peso across the espalda of the hombros. Your pies should be slightly wider than cadera width apart with the pies turned out, the same posición that you would perform a squat with.
Empieza by dipping with the rodillas slightly, and popping espalda up to briefly unload the barra. Drive yourself underneath the barra, elevating it overcabeza as you descend into a full squat.
Return to a standing posición.

instructions_en: Begin with a wide grip on the bar, with an overhand or hook grip. The feet should be directly below the hips with the feet turned out. Your knees should be slightly bent, and the torso inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the head facing forward. The bar should be just below the knees. This will be your starting position.
Aggressively extend through the legs and hips. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, forcefully pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. Receive the bar with your body as low as possible and the arms fully extended overhead.
Return to a standing position with the weight overhead, and then return the weight to the floor under control.
instructions_es: Empieza with a agarre amplio on the barra, with an overmano or hook grip. The pies should be directly below the caderas with the pies turned out. Your rodillas should be slightly bent, and the torso inclined forward. The spine should be fully extended and the cabeza facing forward. The barra should be just below the rodillas. Esta será la posición inicial.
Aggressively extend through the legs and caderas. At peak extension, shrug the hombros and allow the codos to flex to the side.

As you move your pies into the receiving posición, forcefully pull yourself below the barra as you elevate the barra overcabeza. Receive the barra with your body as low as possible and the brazos fully extended overcabeza.
Return to a standing posición with the peso overcabeza, and then return the peso to the suelo under control.

instructions_en: Begin with a loaded barbell on the floor. The bar should be close to or touching the shins, and a wide grip should be taken on the bar. The feet should be directly below the hips, with the feet turned out as needed. Lower the hips, with the chest up and the head looking forward. The shoulders should be just in front of the bar. This will be the starting position.
Begin the first pull by driving through the front of the heels, raising the bar from the ground. The back angle should stay the same until the bar passes the knees.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the hips knees and ankles, driving the bar up as quickly as possible. The bar should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the shoulders and allow the elbows to flex to the side.

As you move your feet into the receiving position, a slightly wider position, pull yourself below the bar as you elevate the bar overhead. The bar should be received in a partial squat. Continue raising the bar to the overhead position, receiving the bar locked out overhead.
Return to a standing position with the weight over head.
instructions_es: Empieza with a loaded barrara on the suelo. The barra should be close to or touching the shins, and a agarre amplio should be taken on the barra. The pies should be directly below the caderas, with the pies turned out as needed. Lower the caderas, with the pecho up and the cabeza looking forward. The hombros should be just in front of the barra. This will be the posición inicial.
Empieza the first pull by driving through the front of the talones, raising the barra from the ground. The espalda angle should stay the same until the barra passes the rodillas.

Transition into the second pull by extending through the caderas rodillas and ankles, driving the barra up as quickly as possible. The barra should be close to the body. At peak extension, shrug the hombros and allow the codos to flex to the side.

As you move your pies into the receiving posición, a slightly wider posición, pull yourself below the barra as you elevate the barra overcabeza. The barra should be received in a partial squat. Continue raising the barra to the overcabeza posición, receiving the barra locked out overcabeza.
Return to a standing posición with the peso over cabeza.

instructions_en: Begin with a bar on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Suspend the bar using chains or suspension straps.

Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of your shoulders as you would a power squat, not on top of your traps. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the floor when bent over.  Keep your back tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your knees slightly bent.  Keep your back arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Begin the motion by extending through the hips with your glutes and hamstrings, and you are standing with the weight.
Slowly lower the weight back to the starting position, where it is supported by the chains.
instructions_es: Empieza with a barra on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Suspend the barra using chains or suspension straps.

Bend over underneath the barra and rack the barra across the rear of your hombros as you would a power squat, not on top of your traps. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the suelo when bent over.  Mantén your espalda tight, hombro blades pinched together, and your rodillas slightly bent.  Mantén your espalda arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Empieza the motion by extending through the caderas with your glúteos and isquios, and you are standing with the peso.
Slowly lower the peso espalda to the posición inicial, where it is supported by the chains.

instructions_en: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, with the bar hanging just below the knees. Your back should be straight and inclined slightly forward.

Begin by aggressively extending through the hips, knees and ankles, driving the weight upward. As you do so, shrug your shoulders towards your ears.  As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out.

At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front squat position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom squat position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.
instructions_es: Empieza with a hombro width, double overmano or hook grip, with the barra hanging just below the rodillas. Your espalda should be straight and inclined slightly forward.

Empieza by aggressively extending through the caderas, rodillas and ankles, driving the peso upward. As you do so, shrug your hombros hacia your ears.  As full extension is achieved, transition into the third pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the brazos with the codos up and out.

At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your codos under the barra as you do so. Receive the barra in a front squat posición, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the barra at the end of the third pull. The barra should be racked onto the protracted hombros, lightly touching the throat with the manos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom squat posición, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the talones, keeping the torso upright and codos up. Continue until you have risen to a standing posición.

instructions_en: Begin with a shoulder width, double overhand or hook grip, with the bar hanging at the mid thigh position. Your back should be straight and inclined slightly forward.

Begin by aggressively extending through the hips, knees and ankles, driving the weight upward. As you do so, shrug your shoulders towards your ears.   As full extension is achieved, transition into the final pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the arms with the elbows up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your elbows under the bar as you do so. Receive the bar in a front squat position, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the bar at the end of the third pull. The bar should be racked onto the protracted shoulders, lightly touching the throat with the hands relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom squat position, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the heels, keeping the torso upright and elbows up. Continue until you have risen to a standing position.
instructions_es: Empieza with a hombro width, double overmano or hook grip, with the barra hanging at the mid thigh posición. Your espalda should be straight and inclined slightly forward.

Empieza by aggressively extending through the caderas, rodillas and ankles, driving the peso upward. As you do so, shrug your hombros hacia your ears.   As full extension is achieved, transition into the final pull by aggressively shrugging and flexing the brazos with the codos up and out. At peak extension, aggressively pull yourself down, rotating your codos under the barra as you do so. Receive the barra in a front squat posición, the depth of which is dependent upon the height of the barra at the end of the third pull. The barra should be racked onto the protracted hombros, lightly touching the throat with the manos relaxed. Continue to descend to the bottom squat posición, which will help in the recovery.
Immediately recover by driving through the talones, keeping the torso upright and codos up. Continue until you have risen to a standing posición.

instructions_en: Begin with a bar on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Bend over underneath the bar and rack the bar across the rear of your shoulders as you would a power squat, not on top of your shoulders. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the floor when bent over.  Keep your back tight, shoulder blades pinched together, and your knees slightly bent.  Keep your back arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Begin the motion by extending through the hips with your glutes and hamstrings, and you are standing with the weight. Slowly lower the weight back to the pins returning to the starting position.
instructions_es: Empieza with a barra on a rack at about the same height as your stomach. Bend over underneath the barra and rack the barra across the rear of your hombros as you would a power squat, not on top of your hombros. At the proper height, you should be near parallel to the suelo when bent over.  Mantén your espalda tight, hombro blades pinched together, and your rodillas slightly bent.  Mantén your espalda arched and your cervical spine in proper alignment.
Empieza the motion by extending through the caderas with your glúteos and isquios, and you are standing with the peso. Slowly lower the peso espalda to the pins returning to the posición inicial.

instructions_en: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the bar and take the weight across your shoulders. Maintain a straight back and a small bend at your knees when unracking the bar. Press through your legs to lift the bar up and take a small step backwards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a shoulder width stance, maintain a straight back throughout and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to lean forward from your waist. Push your hips and glutes backward as you do so until your torso is just off being parallel to the floor. Your hamstrings should be under tension at this point.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the barbell to the starting position along the same path, thrusting your hips forward, squeezing your glutes as you do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed. (Remember to keep your back straight throughout the whole movement).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from any back injuries, this may not be the most suitable exercise for you.
Variations: Barbell Hip Thrusts or Stiff Leg Dumbbell Deadlifts.
instructions_es: Coloca the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barrara can lay across your hombros comfortably. Next, set the safety barras at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the peso and you will be safe. Load up the barrara with the correct amount of peso on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the barra and take the peso across your hombros. Mantén a straight espalda and a small bend at your rodillas when unracking the barra. Press through your legs to lift the barra up and take a small step espaldawards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a hombro width stance, maintain a straight espalda throughout and keep your cabeza up. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and begin to lean forward from your waist. Push your caderas and glúteos espaldaward as you do so until your torso is just off being parallel to the suelo. Your isquios should be under tension at this point.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barrara to the posición inicial along the same path, thrusting your caderas forward, squeezing your glúteos as you do so. Colócate de pie to attention with your legs fully extended, espalda straight and hombros relaxed. (Remember to keep your espalda straight throughout the whole movimiento).
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: If you suffer from any espalda injuries, this may not be the most suitable exercise for you.
Variaciones: barra Hip Thrusts or Stiff Leg mancuerna Deadlifts.
