instructions_en: To begin, first set the bar in a rack slightly below shoulder level.  Rest the bar on top of the deltoids, pushing into the clavicles,  and lightly touching the throat. Your hands should be in a clean grip, touching the bar only with your fingers to help keep it in position.

Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.  Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Keep your head and elbows up at all times. This will be your starting position.

Bend at the knees, sitting down between your legs.  Continue down until your hamstrings are on your calves. Keep your knees aligned with your feet by consciously using your abductors to push your knees out as you squat.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly with the heel or middle of your foot as you straighten the legs again and return to the starting position.
instructions_es: To begin, first set the barra in a rack slightly below hombro level.  Rest the barra on top of the deltoids, pushing into the clavicles,  and lightly touching the throat. Your manos should be in a clean grip, touching the barra only with your fingers to help keep it in posición.

Lift the barra off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.  Step away from the rack and posición your legs using a hombro width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Mantén your cabeza and codos up at all times. Esta será la posición inicial.

Bend at the rodillas, sitting down between your legs.  Continue down until your isquios are on your gemelos. Mantén your rodillas aligned with your pies by consciously using your abductors to push your rodillas out as you squat.
Empieza to raise the barra as you espira by pushing the suelo mainly with the talón or middle of your pie as you straighten the legs again and return to the posición inicial.

name_en: Barbell Front Squats To A Bench Clean Grip
instructions_en: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set a flat bench behind you and set the bar on a rack that best matches your height.  Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, bring your arms up under the bar while keeping the elbows high and the upper arm slightly above parallel to the floor.  Rest the bar on top of the deltoids and cross your arms while grasping the bar for total control.
Lift the bar off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back.  This will be your starting position.  (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the foot positioning section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up.  Continue down until you touch the bench with your glutes.  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front.  If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor mainly with the heel of your foot as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: This is not an exercise to be taken lightly.  If you have back issues, substitute it with the dumbbell squat variation or a leg press instead.  If you have a healthy back, ensure perfect form and never slouch the back forward as this can cause back injury. Be cautious as well with the weight used; in case of doubt, use less weight rather than more.  The front squat is a very safe exercise but only if performed properly.  This version of the squat is better suited for advanced athletes.
Variations: As previously mentioned, there are various stances that can be used depending on what you want to emphasize.
name_es: Barra Front sentadillas To A Bench clean Grip
instructions_es: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set a flat banco behind you and set the barra on a rack that best matches your height.  Once the correct height is chosen and the barra is loaded, bring your brazos up under the barra while keeping the codos high and the upper brazo slightly above parallel to the suelo.  Rest the barra on top of the deltoids and cross your brazos while grasping the barra for total control.
Lift the barra off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and posición your legs using a hombro width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Mantén your cabeza up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight espalda.  Esta será la posición inicial.  (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances described in the pie posicióning section).

Empieza to slowly lower the barra by bending the rodillas as you maintain a straight posture with the cabeza up.  Continue down until you touch the banco with your glúteos.  Inspira as you perform this portion of the movimiento.  Consejo: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the rodillas should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front.  If your rodillas are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the rodilla and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Empieza to raise the barra as you espira by pushing the suelo mainly with the talón of your pie as you straighten the legs again and go espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: This is not an exercise to be taken lightly.  If you have espalda issues, substitute it with the mancuerna squat variation or a leg press instead.  If you have a healthy espalda, ensure perfect form and never slouch the espalda forward as this can cause espalda injury. Be cautious as well with the peso used; in case of doubt, use less peso rather than more.  The front squat is a very safe exercise but only if performed properly.  This version of the squat is better suited for advanced athletes.
Variaciones: As previously mentioned, there are various stances that can be used depending on what you want to emphasize.

instructions_en: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the bar and take the weight across the front of your shoulders. You can either relax your wrists and place then under the bar to secure its position or you can cross your arms over and lift your elbows, which ever is most comfortable for yourself. Maintain a straight back and a small bend at your knees when unracking the bar. Press through your legs to lift the bar up and take a small step backwards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Kettlebell Squats.
instructions_es: Coloca the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barrara can lay across your hombros comfortably. Next, set the safety barras at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the peso and you will be safe. Load up the barrara with the correct amount of peso on it and you are now ready to go.

Step underneath the barra and take the peso across the front of your hombros. You can either relax your wrists and place then under the barra to secure its posición or you can cross your brazos over and lift your codos, which ever is most comfortable for yourself. Mantén a straight espalda and a small bend at your rodillas when unracking the barra. Press through your legs to lift the barra up and take a small step espaldawards into the middle of the rack.
Adopt a hombro width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Mantén a straight espalda throughout the movimiento and keep your cabeza up. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and begin to descend by bending at your rodillas and caderas. Your peso should be put predominantly through your talones as you sit espalda into the movimiento until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the suelo.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barra to the posición inicial along the same path, push through your talones with the force being driven through your cuádriceps to do so. Colócate de pie to attention with your legs fully extended, espalda straight and hombros relaxed.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: This is a very complex movimiento and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your pesos. If you suffer from espalda issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variaciones: barra Squats or Kettlebell Squats.

instructions_en: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height.  The correct height should be anywhere above the waist but below the chest. Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, lock your hands together and place the bar on top of your arms in between the forearm and upper arm.
Lift the bar up so that it is resting on top of your forearms.  If you are holding the bar properly, it should look as if you have your arms crossed but with a bar running across them.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a shoulder width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Keep your head up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight back.  This will be your starting position.  (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up.  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor).  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front.  If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the ball of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: This exercise is not to be taken lightly as you are applying a lot of pressure to your arms when lifting the barbell.  It is always a good idea to have a spotter as they can help you keep proper form.  Also, make sure that your back is kept straight as bending it can cause an injury.

The correct height should be anywhere above the waist but below the pecho. Once the correct height is chosen and the barra is loaded, lock your manos together and place the barra on top of your brazos in between the forebrazo and upper brazo.
Lift the barra up so that it is resting on top of your forebrazos.  If you are holding the barra properly, it should look as if you have your brazos crossed but with a barra running across them.

Step away from the rack and posición your legs using a hombro width medium stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Mantén your cabeza up at all times as looking down will get you off balance and also maintain a straight espalda.  Esta será la posición inicial.  (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the pie stances section).

Empieza to lower the barra by bending the rodillas as you maintain a straight posture with the cabeza up.  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the gemelos becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the suelo).  Inspira as you perform this portion of the movimiento.  Consejo: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the rodillas should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front.  If your rodillas are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the rodilla and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Empieza to raise the barra as you espira by pushing the suelo with the ball of your pie mainly as you straighten the legs again and go espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Precaución: This exercise is not to be taken lightly as you are applying a lot of pressure to your brazos when lifting the barrara.  It is always a good idea to have a spotter as they can help you keep proper form.  Also, make sure that your espalda is kept straight as bending it can cause an injury.

name_en: Standing Narrow Grip EZ Bar Overhead Tricep Extensions
instructions_en: Grab a barbell with an overhand, shoulder width grip and press towards the ceiling until your elbows are locked out. Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your back straight, barbell directly above your head. Tip: Keep your elbows as close together as you can throughout to initiate maximum tricep activity. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend the barbell on a semi-circular motion down towards the back of your head. Keep the upper arms still and control this movement through bending your elbows and stretching your triceps. Remember to keep your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a brief movement once you have created an acute angle at your elbows. Then pull through your triceps to take the barbell back along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Overhead Tricep Extension (Rope On Cables) or Barbell Skullcrushers (Incline).
name_es: De pie agarre cerrado barra EZ por encima de la cabeza tríceps Extensions
instructions_es: Coge a barrara with an overmano, hombro width grip and press hacia the techo until your codos are locked out. Adopt a standing, hombro width stance with your espalda straight, barrara directly above your cabeza. Consejo: Mantén your codos as close together as you can throughout to initiate maximum tricep activity. Esta será la posición inicial.

Inspira and descend the barrara on a semi-circular motion down hacia the espalda of your cabeza. Mantén the upper brazos still and control this movimiento through bending your codos and stretching your tríceps. Remember to keep your codos tucked in.
Pause for a brief movimiento once you have created an acute angle at your codos. Then pull through your tríceps to take the barrara espalda along the same path to your posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Overcabeza Tricep Extension (Rope On Poleas) or barra Skullcrushers (Incline).
